programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. GADGET has ordered a new watch. He gets his orders from Chief Quimby that MAD is unleashing weapons disguised as novelties.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Lady Killer
programme.desc: Investigators find the parallels between the two cases troubling: two young, isolated and vulnerable Guyanese women, two deaths in strange circumstances, two life insurance policies. Will Mohammed Khan escape justice again?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found floating next to a dock. The case takes the detectives into a sinister world from which few come out unharmed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: On October 1, 2000, 10-year-old Heather Thomas disappeared from her father’s Cloverdale townhouse. Ertmoed is arrested and confesses that he lured Heather into his apartment on the pretext of showing her pictures of birds and strangles her to death.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mortal Passion
programme.desc: In early April 2000, two students discover the lifeless body of a young woman on the edge of a river. The victim has wounds on her neck, but a murder weapon is not found at the scene. Investigators find a piece of paper in the victim’s pant pocket.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Devil in the Woods
programme.desc: On June 24th 1990, the day after a rock festival near Roseisle in Manitoba, 16 year-old Brigitte Grenier is found lying dead in a stream in the middle of the woods. The teenager’s body shows signs of violence and sexual mutilations.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: Following the gruesome discovery of a skeleton transported by water on an island, several detectives are challenged as they seek to unravel the unsolved mystery of the woman with no name.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Lethal Investment
programme.desc: April 1999 in the Port of Quebec City, the "Spirit of Columbus" is moored at Pier 29. A worker sees a body floating at the base of the platform. The pathologist determines that the woman had been strangled. The case is becomes a murder.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Bathtub Sisters
programme.desc: The mother of two teenaged girls is found dead in her bathtub. The coroner declares it an accidental death, but a year later, new information prompt the police to reopen the case.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Dire Straits
programme.desc: A college student in Staten Island meets a deceivingly charming man who sweeps her off her feet. But the relationship turns sour when his true nature is revealed.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Sandi Musk was looking for a partner when she meets a young man with a violent streak. When Sandi tries to call off the relationship, she is in for a nightmare beyond belief.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: After moving to a quiet suburb, "Mary" finds a new best friend in next-door neighbor Jane. But, before long, it's clear that there's something strange about Jane.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Fear F.M.
programme.desc: K.T. Mills is a popular radio DJ with a friendly voice. But when one deranged listener becomes obsessed with the woman behind the mic, her life is turned upside down.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: Christen thinks she's met her college sweetheart but she breaks things off when he reveals his cruel nature. When John's dark past is publically exposed, John stops at nothing to get revenge.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hopelessly Devoted
programme.desc: When Kaia Anderson is kind to fellow student Robert, she never imagined it will lead to a lifelong obsession that won't be stopped by reason or the law.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: When kickboxing champion Lee Redmond helps a woman in need, he finds himself the object of what could soon become a fatal attraction.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Love is a Battlefield
programme.desc: A young nurse falls in love and marries the man of her dreams. But before long, her husband becomes violent and controlling.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Haunting Obsession
programme.desc: Tracy is in the 8th grade when she offers to tutor an outcast. Little does she know, this simple act of kindness will become a never-ending nightmare.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Gamble with Death
programme.desc: After Donna Eskew calls off her romance with Glen, he corners Donna in a casino parking lot with a chilling threat. She'll have to use all her wits to stay alive.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: 13-year-old Jessie Cooper thinks Nick Hamilton is just a nice neighbor. Little does she know he's a sex offender with a penchant for adolescent girls.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Bogeyman
programme.desc: Sherry Meinberg is living the innocent life of a teen in the 1950s when she meets handsome Chuck Gray. But the man of her dreams soon turns into a monster.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Predator By Proxy
programme.desc: After Angell kicks her ex-husband Michael out of the house, he returns for revenge. Michael creates fake advertisements that send strange men right to Angell's door.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Badlands
programme.desc: Marie DePalma, a shy middle school student in Detroit, is thrilled when an older student takes an interest in her. As their relationship develops, her life turns into a living hell.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Campaign of Terror
programme.desc: Bob Krueger is devastated to lose a race for the Senate. But nothing could protect his family from the obsession of a former staffer who now threatens to destroy them.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Stalked.com
programme.desc: After meeting online, Patrick begins to stalk Kristen across the web. Kristen begins to realize that nothing will stop her cyberstalker from tracking her down with deadly intentions.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Ties that Blind
programme.desc: Kathy is thrilled when her husband David treats her well, as he often beats her down with insults and abuse. When Kathy tries to escape her marriage, David is not about to let her go.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Power Play
programme.desc: Jane Haag rarely has time to date until she falls in love with Ron. But Jane discovers that Ron is a virtual time bomb about to explode.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: At first, Karen Welch thinks nothing of the mysterious call she receives on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: The Case: A French Cold Case
programme.desc: The murder of 16-year-old schoolgirl Christelle Maillery, committed at Le Creusot in 1986.

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.
programme.sub-title: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?

programme.title: Naked Science: Diamonds
programme.desc: Naked Science follows the story of a diamond from the creation of carbon inside the heart of a dying sun, through to the cutting of a diamond mine in South Africa.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: El Niño
programme.desc: It is estimated that between 1997 and 1998, “El Niño” took the lives of 24,000 people and created a startling $34 billion (US) in economic damages worldwide. In this episode we explain what “El Niño” is.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Tornadoes
programme.desc: The Tornado is one of Mother Nature’s most extraordinary phenomena. These intense, rapidly rotating columns of air can attain wind speeds of more than 480 kilometres per hour, and have been witnessed on every continent except Antarctica.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Avalanches
programme.desc: We tend to think of disasters as inevitable - but often Mother Nature gives us vital clues which we foolishly ignore or overlook. This episode will take a close look at avalanches and what we can learn about how, where, and why they strike.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Mosquitoes
programme.desc: In 2014, Microsoft Founder Bill Gates described the mosquito as the “deadliest animal in the world.” It is estimated by the World Health Organisation that they kill roughly 750,000 people per year.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Earthquakes
programme.desc: Many of our most densely populated cities are situated on the Earth’s most seismically active fault lines. Deadly, highly destructive, and impossible to predict, Earthquakes are truly one of Mother Nature’s most terrifying forces.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: From "Fin Del Mundo," George sails on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps in Antarctic snow and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off melting glaciers.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hawaii: Surf & Snow
programme.desc: In Hawaii George explores the wild side: diving with Galapagos sharks, ascending to snow-covered Mauna Kea, dental cleaning by Peppermint Cleaner Shrimp, extreme surfing at Banzai Pipeline, getting his boots lit on fire by Kilauea volcano.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Elephant Cave
programme.desc: Waterfall-shrouded Kitum Cave has been carved out by elephants in search of salt on Mount Elgon at the Kenya-Uganda border. George gets bitten by one of the cave bats suspected of carrying the deadly Marburg virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hottest and Coldest
programme.desc: George meets ultra-marathon runners in searing heat of Death Valley and bone-chilling cold of the Yukon. He dog-sleds in snow and meets wild characters like Caveman Bill, who has lived alone in a cave through 12 long cold Yukon winters.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Indonesia
programme.desc: In Indonesia George visits massive Komodo Dragons, explores steaming sulfur vents of Papandayan, visits villagers whose town got swept away by Sidoarjo Mudflow, and tackles his toughest climb to date - the very active Semeru Volcano.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Timbuktu: Birthplace of Hurricanes
programme.desc: Dust storms can spin off from Africa into the Atlantic and morph into tropical hurricanes that threaten the Caribbean and USA. While searching for Timbuktu's dust storms, George finds adventure in the landscape and culture of West Africa.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Weather Season
programme.desc: 2005 seemed to be the year that Earth went wild. Follow George as he brings us back to the site of his hairiest adventures from that year.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fire And Water
programme.desc: It's the intense summer wildfires that often plague the area during their 24 hours of daylight. He travels by train, bike, plane and whitewater raft to reach the fires but Mother Nature has other plans for him and doesn't make things easy.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Most people's idea of a dream wedding might include a horse drawn carriage and an elaborate ceremony. Not George. Join him as he and his bride to be tie the knot in an unusual and certainly exotic way.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Naked Science: Mars
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Heatwaves
programme.desc: Temperatures in places like Saudi Arabia routinely exceed 40 degrees Celsius with very little effect on the population. However, when the same extreme heat struck the people of Russia in 2010, it killed an estimated 56,000 people.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Hellephant in the Room
programme.desc: At SEMA 2018 Mark was gifted the first third-generation 426 Hemi-Crate engine by Mopar and now must decide which car he's going to install it in for SEMA 2019. Meanwhile Will begins paint-prep on a beautiful Rallye Red 1970 Plymouth 'Cuda.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Road Running Home
programme.desc: Good news from Mark's daughter Allyssa! She's pregnant with her fourth child and this time Mark will have a grandson! Unfortunately Mark needs to find a replacement to help with his pet project "The Autopsy Report".

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: One for the Road Movie
programme.desc: The Vanishing Point Challenger has not disappeared from view. After years of gathering rust in the Graveyard this 1970 Alpine White Challenger R/T tribute car has been cleaned up and has received most of its sheet metal.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Ice-Trey 200
programme.desc: To celebrate the 200th episode of Graveyard Carz Mark and the Ghoulz visit a private automotive museum!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Dude, Where's Allysa's Car?
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: More than a Number
programme.desc: Tune in to the season finale of Graveyard Carz and find out what made this season one for the record books! On this special episode Mark and the Ghoulz count and catalog every significant restoration from the very first 1970 Road Runner in season 1

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Firepower Operation
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: A Hunk of Burning Love
programme.desc: What do you get when you cross a bird with a fish? The one and only Phoenix 'Cuda!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: This Roadrunner gives me a Hemi
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.
programme.sub-title: This Roadrunner gives me a Hemi

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: Steve is under pressure, as he has to race a type of banger car that injured and nearly killed him in past races.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: Tensions run high at Banger Boy HQ as the team prepare for two of the biggest races of the season.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: In a surprise twist of events, Steve participates in a caravan smashup at the request of a Norwegian TV channel.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: Banger Boys Darren and Pope are hot contenders for a major race, but their mortal enemies, the Dreambusters, are out to spoil their chances.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: Steve turns a 1960s Wolsey into a dream machine, driving it in a race that he has a personal connection to. Meanwhile, the Dreamers must source dozens of cars for a TV action stunt.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: Taking a trip down memory lane, Steve visits the place where his banger obsession began and sources a car for the last leg of the racing season.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: In the series climax, Steve tries to win the World Banger Racing Championship. Meanwhile, Flip and Steve need to win their qualifying races before they can get through to the final match.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: Steve fights for a shot at the World Banger Championship, and winning an upcoming race may give him the crucial points needed to qualify for the big event.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Dougie does a deep dive when he completely builds out the rear end assembly for our 1969 GTX. Mark and George break out the hydraulics to reverse the damage done to Mark's newest acquisition. And a Graveyard favorite returns.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: 72 Charger SE Resurrected
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Races Jethrine
programme.desc: Will Sonny propose to Elly? Can Pearl marry her daughter off? Utter confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Great Feud
programme.desc: Sonny jilts Elly and the Clampetts load their shootin’ irons for a match with the Drysdales.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Home For Christmas
programme.desc: When Granny, Uncle Jed, Elly May and Jethro decide to return to the country for the holidays, they discover airline travel.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Home for Christmas, the Clampetts help Pearl woo Mr. Brewster, a big oil company executive.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Rescues Pearl
programme.desc: Pearl attempts to snag Mr. Brewster until he makes a ridiculous public announcement.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Back To Californy
programme.desc: Jed is confronted with too many cooks when he invites Pearl and Jethrine to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed's Dilemma
programme.desc: Jed takes the family on a sight seeing tour of Beverly Hills to cool a feud between Granny and Pearl.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage
programme.desc: Drysdale’s marriage is threatened when he gets a new housekeeper while his wife is away.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly's Animals
programme.desc: Police and Elly’s animals converge on the Clampett estate when Pearl starts giving yodeling lessons.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Throws A Wing Ding
programme.desc: Two of Pearl’s ardent suitors come to visit her in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Plays Solomon
programme.desc: Granny’s plan to stop Pearl’s yodeling backfires when the police come and find her still.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Duke Steals A Wife
programme.desc: Duke, Jed’s bloodhound, becomes matchmaker for his master and Mlle. Denise, a glamorous Frenchwoman.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Buys The Freeway
programme.desc: A confidence man tries to sell Jed the Hollywood Bowl and a Freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Becomes A Banker
programme.desc: Jed is made a bank vice president so he can compete in an interbank skeet shoot.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Family Tree
programme.desc: An expert on American history finds evidence that Jed’s family preceded the Mayflower to America.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Cuts The Family Tree
programme.desc: Mrs. Smith Standish is spending more time with the Clampetts, desperate to find out if the Clampetts did in fact precede the ‘Mayflower.’

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Granny's Spring Tonic
programme.desc: Granny hands around the Spring Tonic to the family, giving Jed a double dose. At the bank, Gloria transforms herself into a gorgeous secretary, with her sights set on Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Pays His Income Tax
programme.desc: Granny thinks a man from the IRS is a revenuer and chases him off with her gun.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts And The Dodgers
programme.desc: Leo Durocher wants to sign Jethro as a pitcher on the Dodgers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Duke Becomes A Father
programme.desc: Jed falls for a beautiful Beverly Hills matron.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Entertain
programme.desc: Drysdale comes up for a raise when he lands the Clampett account.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts In Court
programme.desc: As the Clampetts are going to the bank, a car bumps into them. When the Johnsons in the car learn how much money the Clampetts have, they decide to sue them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed
programme.desc: An unlucky psychiatrist somehow winds up with Jethro as a patient.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted
programme.desc: The psychiatrist shows an interest in Granny’s mountain remedies.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Ellie Becomes A Secretary
programme.desc: The Clampetts offer to help out at Drysdale’s bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jethro's Friend
programme.desc: The Clampetts show Jethro’s friend how to have some fun

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Gets The Misery
programme.desc: Jed feels poorly, and the family is worried about him. To make Elly feel better, Jed reveals that he is faking an illness to please Granny. Drysdale fakes an illness as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Hair-Raising Holiday
programme.desc: A doctor blows the whistle on Granny’s mountain-medicine practice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Granny's Garden
programme.desc: Granny wants to plough the front lawn of the mansion to grow vegetables.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Starts To School
programme.desc: Elly May is preparing for her first day of the Willows, a finishing school Mrs. Drysdale recommended where she hopes the girls will offend Elly and run the Clampetts out of town.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampett Look
programme.desc: A new fashion -- “The Clampett Look” -- comes to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jethro's First Love
programme.desc: Jethro falls in love with a stripper named Chickadee Laverne and takes her home to meet the family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Chickadee Returns
programme.desc: Chickadee (Barbara Nichols) returns with a new act.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our Solar System four and half billion years ago there remains tantalizing clues to its evolution; remnent debris: asteroids and comets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: OCEANS IN THE SKY
programme.desc: Juice and the Europa Clipper are two missions to our Solar System’s largest planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Return To The Moon
programme.desc: The Moon, our closest celestial companion. Our indispensible dance partner through the cosmos.

programme.title: The New Frontier: THE NEXT BIG LEAPS
programme.desc: Projects in the works. SunRISE, SPHEREx, NEOS and others, their mission to expand our knowledge of Earth, the surrounding space, Dark Matter, and the earliest galaxies. N

programme.title: RISING TIDES
programme.desc: The next generation of Earth observation satellites are now in place maintaining the continuity of long-term climate data, in particular the planets rising temperatures and related ocean levels.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: The International Space Station is undoubtedly the jewel in the crown of low Earth orbit; observation post, research lab and class room.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Getting There
programme.desc: Launching payloads into space is a very difficult task, historically rocket launches are the proverbial 'swords into ploughshares'.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Slingshot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Atmosphere
programme.desc: How do astronauts cope with living in space?

programme.title: The New Frontier: GIANTS IN THE DARK
programme.desc: Asteroids, the debris from the early solar system hold tantalizing clues to planetary formation. The spacecraft Psyche readies to study a unique metallic asteroid.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini: Docking and EVA - In the final phase of the Gemini program NASA struggles with docking and spacewalks. Curiosity Roving Mars - On the surface of Mars the Curiosity rover is changing the way we think about the red planet.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini Docking, Mars Curiousity & Satellite Swarms

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Commences - Did Gemini give the US a lead in the space race? Venus Express - The last days of ESA's Venus probe. EMU - NASA's Extravehicular Mobility Unit. Deep Space Communications - ESA's worldwide network of giant dishes.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini, Venus Express, EMU & Deep Space Communication

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Begins - The start of NASA & America's first manned space program. Mars Express - The European Space Agency's Mars Satellite. The Soyuz Launch System - The gradual evolution of Russia's Soyuz launcher.
programme.sub-title: Project Mercury, The Mars Express & The Soyuz Launch System

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Apollo Program Begins - At the very beginning of NASA's moon project things go wrong. Caves - ESA's special training program for astronauts. Planck - Mapping the cosmic microwave background radiation.
programme.sub-title: The Apollo Program Begins, Caves & Planck

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Cold War & The Start of the Space Race - Cold War rivalry and the acceleration of space exploration. Servicing Hubble - Preparations for Hubble's final servicing mission. Chasing a Comet - Launch and the difficult path to rendezvous.
programme.sub-title: The Space Race, The Hubble, Chasing Comets & Space Debris

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Advances - America's first manned space program finally puts a man in orbit. Camera Tracking - The array of special cameras that follow a spacecraft at launch. The International Space Station - The building and operation.
programme.sub-title: Project Mercury Advancement, Camera Tracking & The International Space Station

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Shuttle Program - The first re-useable spacecraft. The Challenger Disaster - Pressing launch schedules lead to carelessness and the loss of the Challenger. Return to Space - A re-designed shuttle is back in space with a redefined role.
programme.sub-title: The Shuttle Program, The Challenger Disaster & Return to Space

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.
programme.sub-title: Beyond Earth Orbit, IXV Vehicles & Galileo Satellites Lost and Found

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Advances - NASA refines the techniques needed for rendezvous. Cassini at Saturn - In the Cassini probe's final years of activity, its handlers are asking it to do more complex and risky assignments.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini Advances, Cassini at Saturn & More About Mars

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Space Shuttle Matures - The Space Transportation System changes the nature of orbital missions. Complex Construction in Space - Confidence in the shuttle begins to return and engineers for get the lessons of the past.
programme.sub-title: The Space Shuttle Matures, Complex Space Construction & The Final Years of the Space Shuttle

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Rebuilding Project Apollo - After the Apollo 1 disaster NASA resumes manned space flight. Orbiting Carbon Observatory 2 - Monitoring the Earth's Co2 levels in unprecedented detail. Zero Gravity Training - Parabolic flights.
programme.sub-title: Rebuilding Apollo, Orbiting Carbon & Zero Gravity Training

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Beginning of the End - After the first Moon landing the Apollo science program was about to start in earnest but people were losing interest. Apollo Gets Complicated - New technology is added that extends the reach of the Apollo program.
programme.sub-title: The Beginning of the End, Apollo Gets Complicated & The End of Apollo

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: To the Moon - The Apollo program achieves its major objective. Dragon, Falcon and Spacex - New directions in re-usable spacecraft. Gaia- Mapping our galaxy in unprecedented detail.
programme.sub-title: To The Moon, SpaceX's Dragon and Falcon & GAIA

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Join Brian Greene on a wild ride into the weird realm of quantum physics, which governs the universe on the tiniest of scales.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Universe or Multiverse?
programme.desc: Cutting-edge theories are suggesting that our universe may not be the only universe. Instead, it may be just one of an infinite number of worlds that make up the multiverse.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: What Is Space?
programme.desc: Brian Greene reveals space as a dynamic fabric that can stretch, twist, warp, and ripple under the influence of gravity, and explores dark energy, which makes up 70% of the universe.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: The Illusion of Time
programme.desc: Brian Greene takes us on the ultimate time traveling adventure, hurtling 50 years into the future before stepping into a wormhole to travel back to Big Bang.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The latest updates on the new space hardware about to launch us into the next generation of space flight some rockets and capsules are on time others not so fortunate.

programme.title: The New Frontier: PEERING INTO THE ABYSS
programme.desc: Imaging a black hole was a breakthrough in astronomy, now with the new satellite IXPE high energy telescope we will be looking at some of the most dramatic, and most violent objects in the universe: Colliding Black holes and Neutron Stars.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: LISA pathfinder, has led the way for a space based gravity wave detector, what are gravity waves and why are they so hard to detect?

programme.title: The New Frontier: Set Course For Heart of the Sun
programme.desc: NASA’S Parker Solar Probe Mission is on its way and will be shortly followed by Europe’s Solar probe Mission.
programme.sub-title: Set Course For Heart of the Sun

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: In a quest to find a lost colleague, a team of scientists find themselves deep underground in an ancient labyrinth, while trying to unearth a secret that has been buried for centuries.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Quest For Akhenatens Tomb
programme.desc: Jack Hunter is abducted blindfolded to a Turkish US base to be recruited by the NSA, told his mentor was killed because Albert Littmann's Russian mob employer Doridanov want the ancient Osiris-weapon.
programme.sub-title: And The Quest For Akhenatens Tomb

programme.title: Bolo
programme.desc: Two convicts get freed from prison and become lawmen in a corrupt village.

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: Starring Eddie Griffin and Nathan Phillips. With the speedometer maxed out, a group of exotic car fanatics hit the streets in hopes of winning a life-changing sum of 24 million dollars. Every rule is broken as these drivers.

programme.title: Bending The Rules
programme.desc: Theo Gold, the New Orleans Assistant District Attorney, is about to have the worst day of his life. Not only does his wife decide to leave him on the eve of his birthday, but he manages to lose a high-profile case.

programme.title: Crystal Skulls
programme.desc: It is 2020 and the apocalypse is inevitable. 12 of 13 Crystal skulls are united causing catastrophic events. Only the 13th Skull can theoretically restore order before the Earth is destroyed from within by their power.

programme.title: The Intergalactic Adventures of Max Cloud
programme.desc: When video-game enthusiast, Sarah is transported into her favorite game, she finds herself on an intergalactic prison, home to the most dangerous villains in the galaxy.

programme.title: Four Robbers
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, and later Thailand, a band of four robbers steal and kill, as their fiercely loyal leader sticks to his principles.

programme.title: Descent
programme.desc: A team of scientists are gathered to prevent a global catastrophe. But one of the scientists realizes early on that the cause of volcanic reactions is most likely due to a secret government operation investigating alternative energy resources.

programme.title: Operation: Endgame
programme.desc: Two rival teams of assassins. One killer day at the office. An all-star cast including Rob Corddry, Ellen Barkin, Zach Galifianakis, Ving Rhames, and Jeffrey Tambor fight to the death to be the last man standing in this hilarious action comedy!

programme.title: Seduced By A Thief
programme.desc: When a security guard is blamed for the theft of a necklace, he tracks down the beautiful thief, only to be seduced into a world of diamond smuggling and double-cross.

programme.title: Encounter with Danger
programme.desc: As Jack leaves town for business, he seizes the opportunity to take Lori along so that they rekindle their relationship. But when he disappears, Lori discovers that Jack was about to reveal the corruption that exists within the company…

programme.title: We Have Your Husband
programme.desc: When her husband is kidnapped, Jayne is pushed to the limit to raise the ransom money that will guarantee his safe return. Based on a true story.

programme.title: The Love of Her Life
programme.desc: Allison has no trouble finding a man, it's keeping them that's the problem. She meets Brian and swears things will be different, but they aren't. When he leaves her, Allison blames Brian's younger sister, and vows to get even by stealing away her son.

programme.title: Hatchet Hour
programme.desc: An ambitious lawyer kills her gardener by mistake, fearing her chances with the law and the impact this will have on her career at a prestigious firm, she turns to her best friend to help her get rid of the body.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: Small-town Erik loses his Ivy League scholarship and turns to mob running with roommate to fund college, facing a dire choice as police close in.

programme.title: Bloodlines
programme.desc: In November 1999, Dr Colin Bouwer, the Head of Psychiatry at Otago Hospital, put a murderous plan into action. A perfect crime, until Andrew Bowers, a young consultant physician, stumbled upon the murder in process.

programme.title: Deadly Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters Janna and Callie are fierce rivals. Janna has the perfect job, and beautiful daughter, Fiona. Callie drifts from job to job and has stepped over the line with the law on her most recent one as a nurse.

programme.title: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Starring Dani Kind and Michelle Stafford. When Dawna Williams' college-aged daughter goes missing, she investigates her daughter's disappearance herself, unaware that her biggest supporter is also the man who may have murdered her child.

programme.title: Gasoline Alley
programme.desc: A man implicated in the triple homicide of three Hollywood starlets begins his own investigation. Needing assistance, he enlists the two detectives on his tail in order to expose a conspiracy more explosive than any of them imagined.

programme.title: Solar Attack
programme.desc: When the sun's increasing expulsions of plasma threaten to ignite methane in our atmosphere, international tensions rise while scientists race for a solution to avoid natural disaster.

programme.title: The Last Boy
programme.desc: The world at an end, a dying mother sends her young son on a journey to the place that grants wishes. A fantasy drama inspired by the works of the 13th Century Sufi Mystic and Poet Rumi.

programme.title: Marjorie Prime
programme.desc: In 2050, 86-year-old Marjorie has a holographic companion who resembles her dead husband and is programmed to feed her the story of her life. With Lois Smith, Jon Hamm, Geena Davis.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: A United States Navy destroyer escort participates in a Navy "invisibility" experiment that inadvertently sends two sailors forty years into the future. Starring: Michael Paré, Nancy Allen, Eric Christmas

programme.title: Apocalypse of Ice
programme.desc: Already in the throes of a viral pandemic, a massive polar vortex threatens to cover nearly all of Earth in ice.

programme.title: Black Box: Black Box
programme.desc: Marcus is the only survivor of a space accident and he ends up trapped in a damaged escape pod, injured and experiencing memory loss. He contacts ground control, but he'll need to remember what happened if they are to help him make it back alive to Earth.

programme.title: Meteor Apocalypse
programme.desc: In this End Times thriller, a gigantic meteor enters Earth's orbit and begins to disintegrate, showering the planet in poisonous debris.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky believes he has picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to discover that aliens are already on Earth and in the process of preparing to take it over.

programme.title: Prospect
programme.desc: A teenage girl and her father travel to a remote alien moon to harvest the moon's elusive gems.

programme.title: The Spying Game: War in the Shadows
programme.desc: The KGB exploits betrayal in US counterintelligence.

programme.title: The Invasion: the Outbreak of World War II: The First Days
programme.desc: The German-Polish two-part series “World War II” reconstructs how the Führer triggered a chain of events sparking a global conflagration.

programme.title: The Invasion: the Outbreak of World War II: The First Victim
programme.desc: Hitler’s Poland Campaign unleashed a “Blitzkrieg” lasting six weeks only. However, it was of unprecedented brutality resulting in a tremendous suffering of the Polish people in the long run.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: Heroes and Misfits
programme.desc: After WW1, misfits and heroes combine to become the Nazis.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: Regrouping
programme.desc: Following the 1923 Beer Hall Putsch’s failure the Nazis regroup.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Fall of Röhm
programme.desc: The Nazis capitalise on the German economic crisis of 1929.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise of Antisemitism
programme.desc: Two of the most powerful Nazis go head to head - Josef Goebbels and Herman Göring.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Berghof Set
programme.desc: Ruthless infighting divides the Nazi leaders at Hitler’s mountain retreat.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Madness of Rudolf Hess
programme.desc: Hitler’s Deputy stakes his reputation on one last desperate gamble.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise and Fall of Reinhard Heydrich
programme.desc: The rise of Reinhard Heydrich: a story of mass murder.
programme.sub-title: The Rise and Fall of Reinhard Heydrich

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise of the Sycophants
programme.desc: Albert Speer: Favouritism, Envy and Betrayal in Hitler’s inner circle.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: Beginning of the End
programme.desc: Germany is losing the war, Hitler’s inner circle plot against the regime.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: Meltdown
programme.desc: The day of reckoning has arrived. The Nazi inner circle plots their escape.

programme.title: Hostages of the SS: A Journey into the Unknown
programme.desc: The SS clandestinely transports their valuable hostages through the Alps.

programme.title: Hostages of the SS: On a Razor's Edge
programme.desc: In Niederdorf the hostages turn the tables on their kidnappers.

programme.title: Signs of Evil - The Runes of the SS
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS stands for terror and the murder of millions. Documentary about the history of a symbol that represents murder.

programme.title: Hitler's People: Conformity
programme.desc: Nazi Germany 10 years before the 1944 assassination attempt: it’s the era just after the seizure of power, when enforced conformity becomes part of all aspects of life.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Dashawn and his mom claim that it was only a one-time fling with Monica and he can’t be the father of her child! Then, party girl April wants to find out who fathered her baby! Later, is Frederick or Jason the father of Marietta’s baby?
programme.sub-title: Is Your Best Friend Fred the Dad?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Outrageous Merry Maury Updates!
programme.desc: Maury is celebrating the holidays with some good ‘olé story-telling by the fireplace. He’ll share the stories of past guests that came for paternity tests, lie detectors and more. Find out if these guests have been naughty or nice!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With Your Dad…Is He My Baby's Father?
programme.desc: After taking 5 DNA tests, Rebecca is back with 2 more men to find the father of her new baby! Then, Don and his wife were happy to find out that their son didn’t father Jessica’s baby, but they’re back because she thinks Don is the dad!
programme.sub-title: I Cheated With Your Dad…Is He My Baby's Father?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did Our Babysitter Have A Baby With My Son?
programme.desc: Don and Amy hired Jessica to babysit their 14-year old son Steven. Years later, Jessica claims that Steven’s the father of her kid! Plus, Marisol has taken 16 DNA tests to find the father of her child. Will test #17 be the final one?
programme.sub-title: Did Our Babysitter Have A Baby With My Son?

programme.title: The Maury Show: You're a Gold Digger…My Man is Not Your Baby's Father!
programme.desc: Charlotte and Tasheun bonded over their children’s mutual father from a photo album, Brandon, but will the DNA test further confirm this? Then, will Tanya prove that her baby Craig III is the son of Craig Jr.?
programme.sub-title: You're a Gold Digger…My Man is Not Your Baby's Father!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is This 50 Year Old My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Will 25 year old Katrina prove that 50 year old Christopher fathered her baby and silence his new fiancé Suprina? Is Johnny or a married man the father of Sarah’s baby? Plus, Robert denies fathering 2 women’s babies!
programme.sub-title: Is This 50 Year Old My Baby's Dad?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 3 Men Tested…Which One Is My Baby's Father?
programme.desc: Brittany thinks Dionte is her baby’s dad and will prove it! Then, 24 year old Melissa claims 47 year old Rob fathered her baby, but Rob’s daughter wants proof! Plus, is Crystal’s baby’s dad her ex, ex’s cousin, or her husband?
programme.sub-title: 3 Men Tested…Which One Is My Baby's Father?

programme.title: The Maury Show: My Daughter Told Me You Cheated!
programme.desc: Tammy suspects her husband Johnnie is sleeping with Renee and is Robert listening to his sister and cheating on his teen fiancée Raven? Plus, did Tom sleep with his best friend’s wife Angela? Marriages are on cliff’s edge today!
programme.sub-title: My Daughter Told Me You Cheated!

programme.title: The Maury Show: This Test Will Tell…Do I really Have 10 Kids?
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé Deon get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, William believes that his 2 of his 6 kids with ex-wife Nicole aren’t his and could be the father of another’s woman’s kid! Our DNA tests reveal the truth!
programme.sub-title: This Test Will Tell…Do I really Have 10 Kids?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Fiancé Cheat with Over 50 Women and My Best Friend?
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, Don and Amy are back for another lie detector test! This time Don wants to know if Amy is sleeping with his brother! Will they ace their tests?
programme.sub-title: Did My Fiancé Cheat with Over 50 Women and My Best Friend?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Wife Betray Me By Sleeping with My Son?
programme.desc: Romel, his wife Chanel and her sister Nakiya are back because he thinks Chanel is sleeping with his 21-year-old son Romel Jr. who’s dating Nakiya! Later, Reggie cheated on Teri 9 times, but does he actually have a sex addiction?
programme.sub-title: Did My Wife Betray Me By Sleeping with My Son?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Maury Guest Updates…I'm Back with a Secret!
programme.desc: They ran, they ranted...but what happened when they went home? Today, some past guests return for more tests! Plus the winner of Maury’s Future Stars 2013 will be announced.
programme.sub-title: Maury Guest Updates…I'm Back with a Secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show: He's My Husband Now. Not Your Baby's Dad!
programme.desc: These guests say they're positive they know the true identity of the father of their children, but they just need a DNA test to prove it. Now the results are about to be revealed, but will they be the results they were hoping for?
programme.sub-title: He's My Husband Now. Not Your Baby's Dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated with 97 Women. Will My Fiancé Forgive Me?
programme.desc: Did Rey cheat on Ashley while she was pregnant with his baby and have a secret threesome behind her back? Plus, Jason is worried that his uncle is paying his fiancé to sleep with him. His uncle has a shocking confession that you have to see!
programme.sub-title: I Cheated with 97 Women. Will My Fiancé Forgive Me?

programme.title: The Maury Show: The Maury Show
programme.desc: It’s a Spring Wild Safari Spectacular on today’s MAURY! Jungle Jack Hanna joins Maury to share some of the most amazing animals we’ve ever seen! Your whole family will want to tune in to watch this amazing episode of MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show: We Had A Threesome…But I'm Not Your Baby's Dad!

programme.sub-title: We Had A Threesome…But I'm Not Your Baby's Dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Teen Moms…Shocking Paternity Test Results!

programme.title: The Maury Show: You Have 11 Kids…The DNA Will Prove It!
programme.desc: Teen mom Casie is dead set on proving Casey is the dad. Is Dirk the father of Brooke’s baby? Which brother fathered Miranda’s baby? Brandon denies both of Me'Chelle's kids but even his mother is on Me'Chelle's side!
programme.sub-title: You Have 11 Kids…The DNA Will Prove It!

programme.title: The Maury Show: 7 Babies. 8 Men. Who's the Father?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister's Boyfriend My Baby's Dad?

programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson treat an injured man after a fierce encounter that he barely escapes.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson travel to the Sussex countryside to 'fish' for clues in a shotgun murder.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Unlucky Gambler

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes investigates a supposed suicide when the widow suspects it's mysterious.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Visiting a home of high nobility, a businessman is murdered.

programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes sets out to discover why a trio of murderous villains, including a dangerously attractive female, are desperate to obtain three unassuming and inexpensive little music boxes.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes in Washington

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Faces Death

programme.title: Windstorm
programme.desc: Rebel teen Mika encounters a beautiful, wild stallion named Windstorm at her grandmother's riding school and learns she can communicate with horses.

programme.title: House of Cards
programme.desc: A widow tries to find out why her daughter's strange behavior, a reaction to the death of her father, is progressively worsening.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Defense

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Rivals

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Competition
programme.desc: Explore the ever-present challenges presented by competing for food, mating rights and territory. The competitive spirit is shown in the hunt and the competition between predator and prey.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Family
programme.desc: Explore the many different concepts of family in the natural world. See how animals get together, raising of cubs and chicks, and learn how family bonds can determine an animal’s fate.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Burning Evidence
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead Men Do Talk
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murderous Attraction
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Flames Of Justice
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Drawing Conclusions
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Predators And Parasites
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Identity
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Face Of Tragedy
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Military Justice
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Bone
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Medical Examiners's Casebook
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims. And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder. These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly intentions
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Face Of Tragedy
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Three hairs microscopic fibers a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Seeking Siegfried
programme.desc: Katikati man Siegfried Newman disappeared on February 25, 2008, after he had dropped his sons Thomas, 9, and Oliver, 7, at Pahoia School. Police carried out a three-day search but found no sign of him.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: Our new team of “ Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to unmask the killer – or killers – of vivacious New Zealand hairdresser Paula Brown who was plucked from Sydney’s downtown after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Long Way Home
programme.desc: 25-year-old Te Puke woman Judy Yorke was a devoted single mum who adored her kids. When she missed her daughter’s fourth birthday party, her family knew something was terribly wrong and reported her missing.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Last Orders
programme.desc: In 1993, devoted father Kevin O'Loughlin came face to face with the dark side of sunny Nelson when he was brutally stabbed to death after a night out on the town.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Psychics Revealed - Special
programme.desc: Behind the scenes with the psychics on the show.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep
programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Night of Terror: The Bega Schoolgirls
programme.desc: On the 6th October 1997, 14-year-old Lauren Barry and 16-year-old Nicole Collins disappeared while walking along a road near their home town of Bega, on the New South Wales south coast.
programme.sub-title: Night of Terror: The Bega Schoolgirls

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Contract to Kill / The Mornington Monster
programme.desc: Crime Investigation Australia has conducted a major investigation which reveals the inside story of the Megan Kalajzich murder and the extraordinary police investigation which will rock the Harbour City's elite to the core.
programme.sub-title: Contract to Kill / The Mornington Monster

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Moorhouse Horrors / The Call Girl Killing
programme.desc: We investigate the story of David and Catherine Birnie, Australia's most sadistic husband and wife killing team, who tortured, raped and murdered four women in 1986.
programme.sub-title: The Moorhouse Horrors / The Call Girl Killing

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Kimberley Killer
programme.desc: Seven years after the disappearance of baby Azaria Chamberlain at Ayers rock, long before the murder of Peter Falconio on a remote stretch of highway in the Australian outback and two years before Ivan Milat begins his reign of backpacker murders.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Gonzales Family Murders
programme.desc: On July 10, 2001, Sef Gonzales murdered his sister Clodine, 18, mother Mary Loiva Josephine, 43, and his father Teddy, 46, in their North Ryde home.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: No More Grannies / The Granny Killer
programme.desc: We delve into the twisted mind of one of Australia's most prolific serial murderers. John Wayne Glover - The Granny Killer, was truly an evil man.
programme.sub-title: No More Grannies / The Granny Killer

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Girls Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: Sallie-Anne Huckstepp and Juanita Nielsen were iconic figures in the shadowy King’s Cross scene of the 1970s and 1980s. They lived dangerous lives – challenging the status quo of the period and met with mysterious and violent deaths.
programme.sub-title: The Girls Who Knew Too Much

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Thrill Kill: The Janine Balding Murder
programme.desc: On a September night in 1986, two police officers climbed through a barbed-wire fence beside the F4 freeway at Minchinbury in Sydney’s west.
programme.sub-title: Thrill Kill: The Janine Balding Murder

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: A Killer Amongst Us: The Norfolk Island Murder
programme.desc: On Easter Sunday 2002, on sleepy Norfolk Island in the south west Pacific, the body of 29-year-old Janelle Patton was found lying in an open field.
programme.sub-title: A Killer Amongst Us: The Norfolk Island Murder

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Blood Sport: The Bondi Gay Murders
programme.desc: In the late 1980s and early 1990s a series of violent murders took place near Sydney’s famous Bondi Beach.
programme.sub-title: Blood Sport: The Bondi Gay Murders

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Mystery of the Homestead Murders
programme.desc: The quick mind of a country telephone exchange supervisor led to a horrific discovery at a NSW country homestead in 1978.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Death in a Heartbeat / The Body in the Bag
programme.desc: CI examines the Dr. Victor Chang extortion murder as well as the horrific Jane Doe Case where a girl is found lying on the side of the road of an inner Sydney suburb wrapped in two plastic garbage bags.
programme.sub-title: Death in a Heartbeat / The Body in the Bag

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Killing Fields of Truro
programme.desc: For the 2008 launch of Crime Investigation Australia, CI presents the complete and compelling story of "The Killing Fields of Truro", one of the most infamous crimes in Australia and yet another set in Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Murder of Innocence: Sian Kingi
programme.desc: On 27 November 1987, 12-year-old Noosa school girl Sian Kingi was grabbed off her push bike by Valmae Fay Beck and Barrie John Watts as she rode home from school.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: No Mercy: The Killing of Virginia Morse
programme.desc: The horrific story of killers Allan Baker and Kevin Crump who began their murderous spree in rural NSW by killing a complete stranger for $20, a packet of cigarettes and a couple of litres of petrol.
programme.sub-title: No Mercy: The Killing of Virginia Morse

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Ivan Milat: The Backpacker Murders
programme.desc: The backpacker murder case in the Belanglo State Forest, south west of Sydney, has entered Australian criminal folklore.

programme.desc: Paris can’t stand to spend another day as a housewife and hires an impersonator to take her place, giving Nicole an opportunity to exact her revenge.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris Hilton and Nicole Richie say goodbye to their jet-setting lifestyle in Los Angeles, and move in with the Ledings, a family in Altus, Arkansas.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole are hired to work at a dairy farm operated by Albert’s no-nonsense friend, but after tiring of the hard work and smell, they head for a nearby hot tub… and end up getting fired.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole are hired to work at a fast-food restaurant, but they’re bored and frustrated by the demands of the job, and soon rebel by pulling pranks during each of their assignments; when the Ledings reprimand them, the girls just go out dancing.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole agree to be honorary co-chairs of the Springtime Gala, but instead of working at the gala, they engage in their usual shocking behavior; the Ledings are embarrassed, and everyone in town is gossiping about Paris and Nicole.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: The girls go to work for a cattle auctioneer, but when they’re sent to buy cattle feed, they charge several other items without permission; the auctioneer comes after them for the money, and the girl try to lie their way out of the debt.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole finally get a job they enjoy: working at a gas station, where there are plenty of guys to flirt with; but a confrontation erupts when Albert and Janet tell the girls to stay away from the small town boys, and the girls disobey them.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole reminisce about their month in Altus, make amends, and say goodbye to the people they’ve come to know before returning to Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole get jobs at Weeki Wachee Springs in Florida and play a surprising game of hide-and-seek with their boss's daughter.

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: While staying with a host family, Nicole butts heads with their oldest son and decides to give him a taste of his own medicine.

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: A stop in Texas brings Paris and Nicole to their new host family; the women convince the Lutz-Carillos boys to sneak out with them to go tanning.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole adjust to a rule against profanity in the household of their new hosts, devout members of a gospel choir; the pair get jobs with a minor league baseball team.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: The cross-country journey takes Paris and Nicole to Texas, where they try to help the host family's teenage son with his homework and take jobs at a local hair salon.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole stop at a ranch in Texas, where they give the father tips on being romantic with his wife; the pair get jobs at the local sheriff's station but their wild antics do not impress the boss.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole work on a cattle drive in Texas but take matters into their own hands when they discover the herd is going to the slaughter.
