programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Reckoning
programme.desc: There is only one week of fishing left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and the Gloucester fleet is set for a final showdown in a bid to catch the last monster tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Head To Tail (Special)
programme.desc: It's a look back at the best moments from two seasons of Wicked Tuna, featuring the wildest catches and fiercest rivalries, plus a sneak peek at the upcoming third season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Wicked Return
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out for Jeffrey's Ledge in hopes of catching the first fish of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Checkmate
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and the Gloucester captains and their crews, from rookies to old pros, get put to the test.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Into The Storm
programme.desc: Bad weather threatens to end the fishing week for the Gloucester fishermen, but while some boats head for home, others decide to take on Mother Nature's wrath.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Operation T.U.N.A
programme.desc: As the hunt for blue fin tuna intensifies, the fisherman resort to espionage for information.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bite Fight
programme.desc: It's the fifth week of the season and the entire fleet battle for the most successful fishing spots.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mission: Fishin!
programme.desc: As Gloucester's Bluefin tuna fleet charges into the heart of the fishing season, it's a tight race for the coveted title of top-earning boat.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Latitude
programme.desc: It's almost halfway through the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and the Gloucester fleet has hit a lull in fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle Royale
programme.desc: With the second half of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna fishing season now underway, competition amongst the Gloucester fleet intensifies when tuna become scarce.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Brotherly Shove
programme.desc: A new week calls for new techniques as the Gloucester Captains try unconventional methods to hook their next paycheck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Blue Grit
programme.desc: Time is running out in the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and, this week, every boat in the Gloucester fleet is facing a different challenge.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Beta Kappa
programme.desc: The tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, know that they have to rely on each other to get the job done, but sometimes trusting the competition isn't such a good idea.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Three weeks left of bluefin tuna season, the Gloucester fleet is desperate to haul in a monster.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sharks and Recreation
programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the pressure begins to take a toll on the captains.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Mighty Bite
programme.desc: With only two weeks left in the fishing season and the price of blue fin tuna on the rise, the Gloucester captains race to bring in record hauls.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Reckoning
programme.desc: There is only one week of fishing left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and the Gloucester fleet is set for a final showdown in a bid to catch the last monster tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Head To Tail (Special)
programme.desc: It's a look back at the best moments from two seasons of Wicked Tuna, featuring the wildest catches and fiercest rivalries, plus a sneak peek at the upcoming third season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: First Blood
programme.desc: It's the first day of the new Bluefin tuna fishing season in Gloucester, Massachusetts, and every captain in the fleet wants to the land the coveted first tuna of the year.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Paul Bint – The Chameleon Con Artist
programme.desc: Dubbed the British Frank Abagnale, Bint committed more than 500 offences including impersonating people.
programme.sub-title: Paul Bint – The Chameleon Con Artist

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Robert Hyams – The Suspect Scientist
programme.desc: Hyams posed as a leading scientist and millionaire art buyer before fleeing to California where he posed as a leading academic.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Emma Golightly – Lonely Hearts Con Woman
programme.desc: Golightly conned tens of thousands of dollars from men she found in lonely hearts columns and dating sites.
programme.sub-title: Emma Golightly – Lonely Hearts Con Woman

programme.title: 72 Hours: Cold Hit
programme.desc: In 1994, a troubled single mother is found raped and murdered in her apartment. Was it one of the volatile men in her life? All possible suspects are eliminated and the case goes cold for three years, until a nine-year old girl is brutally raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Faith Healer
programme.desc: A trucker at a roadside rest station discovers the fully clothed body of a dead East Indian woman.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Sweet Killer
programme.desc: An aging hippy is going through bad times. When he's found dead in his home with a gut of antifreeze, it's a closed case. Then a shocking confession reveals a maelstrom of lies and a story of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Predator
programme.desc: The phone rings in the middle of the night. On the other end of the line, the sounds of an attack. The couple that receive the call rush to its source and discover a horrific scene.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hate Crime
programme.desc: A young Orthodox Jewish man is in Pittsburgh to celebrate Passover with family when he is gunned down simply because of the way he is dressed.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hunted
programme.desc: A real estate broker doesn’t return home. Her family can't find her. But police do - dead in a closet in her office. The DNA on her body is tested against 150 men. No match. The case runs cold.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Burning Obsession
programme.desc: In 1988, a promiscuous 22-year old boy from the Sikh community has one affair too many and ends up losing his life. Diligent detective work and DNA help police nail the killer who believed he had gotten away with murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Model Killer
programme.desc: A gorgeous young model is bludgeoned to death in her downtown apartment. The wounds to her head are so severe police initially presume she's been shot.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Bull's Eye
programme.desc: A Girl Guide leader is found dead on the floor of her bedroom. When an autopsy reveals a bullet lodged in her brain, detectives learn they’re investigating a murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Evil Eyes
programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a park. It’s learned the deceased is a divorced landlady of a group home for transients. The suspect list is long; the clues to follow are few.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Silencer
programme.desc: On September 18, 1985, the life of a small-town bank president is shattered when he receives a call from an unknown man who has kidnapped his wife. The kidnapper demands a ransom for her safe return.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Death of the Disciples
programme.desc: In 1992, gang activity in Chicago is on the rise. With local law enforcement unable to curb the growing drug trade, a multi-agency task force headed by Assistant U.S. Attorney Ron Safer focuses on one of the city’s most vicious street gangs.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Halloween Ambush
programme.desc: A community is horrified when seven trick-or-treaters in Pasadena, California are sprayed with gunfire on Halloween night in 1993, leaving three young boys dead.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Death in Store
programme.desc: A robbery and double homicide at a grocery store in Raleigh, North Carolina shocks the community. With little evidence left behind, and no eyewitnesses, the investigation stalls.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Pride and Joy
programme.desc: Pride and Joy focuses on Eric Napoletano who brutally murdered his victims, including his wife Myra. Napoletano eluded the law from New York to Albuquerque, New Mexico before he was finally arrested on March 27, 1991.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Release Me
programme.desc: Release Me chronicles the story of Texas killer Kenneth Allen McDuff who received the death sentence in 1966 for a murderous rampage that left three teen-agers dead. He was paroled years later only to kill again.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Flames of Rage
programme.desc: When firefighters in suburban Indianapolis are called to a house fire, what they find inside shocks the entire community, a respected minister and his wife have been murdered with an ax.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: The Missing Heiress
programme.desc: In February of 1977, Helen Vorhees Brach walked out of the famed Mayo Clinic in Minnesota, and into the pages of Chicago folklore. The wealthy widowed heiress of the Brach Candy fortune was never seen again.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Career Criminal
programme.desc: A loving mother disappears without explanation in Arlington, Texas. Investigators suspect foul play but search fruitlessly for any sign of her whereabouts.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Shock to The System
programme.desc: Police discover the dead body of Andrew Hopper clutching a syringe and covered with blood. The body is in Dr. G’s hands, as are the clues to solving the case.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Lovers Quarrel
programme.desc: Dr. G must figure out if a man died as a result of his infected stab wound or if his history of drug abuse was the culprit.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Bully Kills
programme.desc: 14-year-old Reena Virk goes to a party at the Craigflower Bridge, near Victoria, Canada. It is there where her's friend's swarm, burn and beat her down.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Backpacker Killer
programme.desc: In the early 1990s, the tourist hotspot of New South Wales, Australia became a place of fear when backpackers started going missing.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Arbitrary Assassins
programme.desc: In November 1996, Raymond Collin went missing in his hometown of Timmins, Ontario. The discovery of his body days later in a snow-covered truck led police to an assortment of possible suspects.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Slave Master
programme.desc: Several women went missing from the Kansas City area in the 1980s and 1990s.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Silent Sniper
programme.desc: In March 1992 Claude Hawkins was shot dead while he was fishing in Ohio. Hawkins' murder mirrored multiple deaths in other nearby counties.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Elusive Rapist
programme.desc: In the winter of 1968, the prairie city of Saskatoon is ravaged by a string of savage rapes.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Terror by Text
programme.desc: On a wintry morning in Sweden, Alexandra Fossmo, wife of pastor Helge Fossmo, was found shot to death in her bed.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Human Hunter
programme.desc: Robert C. Hansen was known for his hunting abilities. In the early 1980s, however, his taste for hunting took a sinister turn.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Menthol Murderer
programme.desc: A week-long search for a missing 10-yr-old Indiana girl ends sadly with her body being discovered in a nearby stream.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Abducted Atheists
programme.desc: American Atheist Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her family vanished in August 1995, leaving behind an ominous note.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: When two suburban housewives are killed in their homes within a week of each other in May 1970, it leaves Toronto in fear.
programme.sub-title: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Doctor of Death
programme.desc: When emergency services arrived at the office of respected neurologist Richard Boggs following the report of a patient's death, they had their suspicions regarding the circumstances...

programme.title: Crime Stories: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist
programme.desc: On December 11, 1987 a hard luck child living in a group home in Ontario was reported missing when she failed to return home from school.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Homocidal Drifter
programme.desc: In the city of Moncton, New Brunswick police discover the bodies of Joan Hicks and her 11-year-old daughter, Nina ‚Äì both brutally murdered late in the night.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Bedroom Strangler
programme.desc: Women are being attacked in their beds at night. Police are baffled as to how this intruder is gaining access to apartments sometimes more than 15 stories up.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Casebook Rapist
programme.desc: An international student is found raped and murdered in the bathroom of her high-rise apartment.

programme.title: Crime Stories: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman
programme.desc: In August of 1982, six members of the Bentley/Johnson family disappear in the Wells Grey National Park without a trace.
programme.sub-title: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Volker Eckert
programme.desc: Volker Eckert, a German truck driver, strangled and killed as many as nineteen women across Europe in a murderous career that lasted over thirty years.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Joachim Kroll
programme.desc: Joachim Kroll murdered at least thirteen people during a span of over twenty years.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 2
programme.desc: Professional scuba diver Brian Green has been found floating and not breathing, and is on a boat near the Noises, a group of islands in the Hauraki Gulf. The team has to move fast.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 2
programme.desc: Tropical rain has hit Wellsford, flooding the entire town and leaving a pregnant woman and her unborn child fighting for their lives.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: The chopper team is responding to a life threatening emergency.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 11
programme.desc: The team is responding to a life-threatening emergency. A cyclist in his 60s, Terrence Williams, is unresponsive and critical after an accident 15 minutes flying time from Auckland, near the small settlement of Maramarua.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Dr Morris suspects Allan's weight loss is due to addiction.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Dr Beecraft assesses whether a bipolar patient can fly.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Dr Morris treats patients who are wracked with anxiety.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: The staff have to dish out some no-nonsense advice.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 7
programme.desc: A toddler is brought in with sepsis and 84-year-old Norman has had a fall.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 6
programme.desc: A man is treated after being involved in a serious motobike accident.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 2
programme.desc: A&E is inundated with accidents & emergencies as a freezing fog descends across Yorkshire.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 5
programme.desc: A high call-out for ambulances has resulted in paramedics queuing with patients.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 7
programme.desc: In Birmingham, there’s blood on the platform, as new biker paramedic Steve Cooper rushes to help a young dad, out with his child, who’s been violently attacked at New Street Station.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 7
programme.desc: The bikers are back in action with the paramedics responding to emergency calls where a child’s been knocked over outside school, and a panic attack at Birmingham Moor Street station.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 12
programme.desc: PC Andy Stanley deals with a man suspected of driving whilst under the influence of drugs, and we meet the police off-road bikers who can take to the fields to pursue criminals.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Steve Harris finds himself under attack when he goes to the rescue of a teenager in a fight.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 2
programme.desc: A two-year-old girl is dealing with low blood sugar levels.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 4
programme.desc: 84-year-old Terry comes in with a badly-broken ankle and fears he may never dance again.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 8
programme.desc: Barnsley Casualty is facing one of its toughest shifts to date with beds becoming limited.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 5
programme.desc: Dr Nick Mani receives a critically ill one-day-old baby.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 1
programme.desc: A man is injured in a grisly circular saw incident; an air ambulance helps a crushed man.

programme.title: Scorpion: Grow a Deer, A Female Deer
programme.desc: When poachers almost kill a pregnant endangered deer, Team Scorpion recreates the animal's womb to try to save it and its baby's life. Also, Happy and Toby discuss the future of their family.
programme.sub-title: Grow a Deer, A Female Deer

programme.title: Scorpion: Nuke Kids on the Block
programme.desc: While decommissioning an old nuclear missile, a simple accident causes Team Scorpion to endure exposure to toxic vapor while trying to prevent the nuke from detonating.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sci Hard
programme.desc: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

programme.title: Scorpion: Queen Scary
programme.desc: At Halloween, Team Scorpion takes on a case to prove the existence of ghosts on the Queen Mary but find an all-too-real disaster when they locate a 'ghost ship' on a deadly collision course.

programme.title: Scorpion: Go With the Florence
programme.desc: While tracking a device that can prevent a nuclear meltdown through the Los Angeles sewers, Walter learns the nuances of listening and not offering advice to Paige.

programme.title: Scorpion: Faire is Foul
programme.desc: For Sylvester's birthday, Team Scorpion visits a renaissance festival, but the revelry is cut short when a group tries to rob a nearby police evidence locker.

programme.title: Scorpion: It's Raining Men (Of War)
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving, Team Scorpion's new neighbor, Florence \, joins them at sea on a mission to destroy a floating island of trash, but her flawed contribution leaves her, Walter and Happy stranded on the quickly dissolving island.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crime Every Mountain
programme.desc: As Cabe's trial looms over Team Scorpion, a simple case goes sideways when they help a father and his daughter whose plane crashes nearby.

programme.title: Scorpion: Who Let the Dog Out ('Cause Now It's Stuck in a Cistern)
programme.desc: As Team Scorpion anxiously awaits the verdict of Cabe's trial which could send him to prison, they focus their nervous energy on trying to save a dog stuck in a cistern.
programme.sub-title: Who Let the Dog Out ('Cause Now It's Stuck in a Cistern)

programme.title: Scorpion: A Christmas Car-Roll
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, when Walter chooses work over spending quality time with his friends, he falls down the stairs and hits his head, and as he lays unconscious, he enters a dream world where Team Scorpion never existed.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Bunker Games
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with Toby's nemesis, Quincy Berkstead and his wife, Amy , when they are locked inside an artificially intelligent doomsday bunker that aims to kill them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Lighthouse of the Rising Sun
programme.desc: A solar storm knocks out power in Los Angeles, and Team Scorpion must help a teen pilot and his girlfriend who are lost over the Pacific without navigation or radio contact.

programme.title: Scorpion: Wave Goodbye
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must prevent an incoming tsunami from hitting a vulnerable nuclear power facility, and Toby secretly helps his ex-fiancée retrieve her stolen identity.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nerd, Wind and Fire
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Team Scorpion must set aside their romantic plans to help a doctor and pilot trapped inside a helicopter that crashed atop a skyscraper.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dumbster Fire
programme.desc: The geniuses of Team Scorpion turn into knuckleheads and Paige must simplify the science for them, when their mental faculties are impaired during a job to prevent the creation of a black hole.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dork Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Team Scorpion inadvertently crashes a bank robbery in progress and is taken hostage. Also, Sylvester's feelings for Florence grow.

programme.title: Scorpion: Gator Done
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to the bayou to track down a cagey alligator in order to stop a deadly mosquito-borne virus, and Paige teaches Walter the concept of the 'white lie.'

programme.title: Scorpion: Foul Balls
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must use their high IQs to win a softball game when the homeland director challenges, with all of their future government contracts on the line.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kenny and the Jet
programme.desc: Paige's maternal side goes into high gear when Team Scorpion must save an unconscious, a hypothermic boy stuck in the wheel well of their airborne airplane.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Lie in the Sand
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Northeast Africa where they must carefully navigate a minefield in order to save the lives of local villagers.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Endgame, Part 1
programme.desc: A TransWarp accident with the Space Bridge sends Ratchet and Captain Fanzone to Cybertron, where Sentinel Prime has the planet on high alert. They soon end up stumbling upon a plot by Shockwave to steal Omega Supreme's Access Codes from Arcee.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Endgame, Part 2
programme.desc: The Autobots discover Omega Supreme's energy signal on the Moon. Rachet insists on going there right away to save him, but Prime refuses, knowing that they are too weak to fight Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: First Encounter
programme.desc: During the war on Cybertron, the Mini-Cons, mini-transformers who can be used as upgrades by their bigger brethren, crash lands on Earth. In present day, a group of children finds their ship by accident which brings the war to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: Escaping from the confrontation between Bots and Cons, Alex, Rad and Carlos find the cargo hold of the Exodus underground and are adopted by three minicons. Retreating to the moon, the 'Cons make the wreck of the Exodus there their base.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Base
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid, and get a condensed history of the conflict. Meanwhile, on the moon, Megatron plots to capture the minicons that are now appearing all over earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Comrade
programme.desc: The children join the Autobot team and head out on their first mission to find a newly waking minicon. The Decepticons arrive to combat them. Optimus Prime finds his old minicon partner.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Soldier
programme.desc: The next minicon alert is from Antarctica. Starscream retrieves the minicon, but has it stolen from him. Hot Shot learns a lesson in cooperation.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Jungle
programme.desc: The newest minicon activates in the middle of a forest: both sides fight for it, and the conflict sets the trees alight. The Autobots attempt to battle the blaze, while Starscream finally acquires his own minicon.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Carnival
programme.desc: Rad and Carlos smuggle their minicons out of the base to visit the town's carnival. Billy and Fred see them transform and try to capture one, but are thwarted by Hot Shot.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Palace
programme.desc: In an ancient palace deep beneath the Sahara another minicon is waking, but who will reach it first - the children or the Decepticon Demolishor?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Confrontation
programme.desc: The Decepticons capture all the children to use as hostages in exchange for the Autobots's minicons. Fred and Billy are officially introduced to the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Underground
programme.desc: The latest minicon re-activates in the subway system of a large city, and there's the usual scramble to see which side can get to it first. And a new transformer makes himself known - but which side is he on?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Ruin
programme.desc: From an ancient submerged city a beautiful girl issues a warning about the devastating power - and danger - of three special, combining minicons. The Autobots already have two of them: now Megatron aims to capture the third.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Prehistory
programme.desc: The children learn more about the history of the minicons and the war. The latest minicon alert leads the team to a volcanic island: the volcano erupts in the middle of the usual 'Bot vs 'Con battle.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Swoop
programme.desc: he Decepticons gain access to the Autobot base, and attempt to take the other two minicons that, with the one Megatron captured on the island, combine to make the supremely powerful Star Sabre. Can Hot Shot save the day?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Overmatch
programme.desc: Hot Shot proves himself very skilled with the Star Sabre, but the arrival of a new Decepticon proves him overconfident. The Decepticons acquire the first of another three combining minicons which transform into the ultimate form of defence.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Gale
programme.desc: A new minicon activates inside a highway tunnel, and the race is on to see who reach it first. Hot Shot is becoming more proficient with the Star Sabre. A new transformer arrives, claiming to be an Autobot, but Rad has his doubts.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Credulous
programme.desc: Grabbing onto Megatron at the end of a battle, Hot Shot and Sideways are transported to the moon. The battle resumes, but Hot Shot is betrayed, and Starscream gains the Star Sabre.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Conspiracy
programme.desc: With the loss of the Star Sabre, the Autobots keep losing battles. In a fog-bound valley, Megatron plots to get the Sabre from Starscream, at the same time boosting his crew's confidence in himself. Scavenger's secret is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Trust
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons face off amongst snowy mountains in the battle for the latest minicon. Despite using the Star Sabre, this time Megatron loses - and Scavenger finally gains the Autobots' trust.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Vacation
programme.desc: A weekend's camping trip to the valley below the dam goes wrong when a violent storm moves in. With Red Alert trapped in a mudslide, the sluice gates about to open, and local reporter Kelly filming, how will the Autobots escape detection?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Reinforcement
programme.desc: Autobot Blurr joins the team, but proves himself not much of a team player. The Decepticons acquire the final minicon to create the Skyboom Shield, the most powerful defensive weapon in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Decisive Battle
programme.desc: Confident of his ability to finally overcome the Autobots, Megatron challenges Optimus to battle. However, when all seems lost Optimus' minicon summons the Skyboom Shield to protect his master.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Vow
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually fails when it's revealed that the minicons have their own, secret agenda.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Rebellion
programme.desc: The Decepticons lose another battle: Megatron takes out his frustration on Starscream, beating him half to death for no reason. Sideways uses the situation to try to foment unrest and rebellion.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Chase
programme.desc: Trapped in cyberspace with Sideways, Alexis, Rad, Carlos and their minicons become aware of a massive evil entity, far more powerful and dangerous than Megatron, lurking threateningly in the background. Or was it all a dream?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Tactician
programme.desc: A new transformer enters the solar system. On the moon, Thrust the master tactician arrives to assist Megatron in his battle against the Autobots, but all does not go according to plan.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Linkup
programme.desc: With Optimus damaged and temporarily out of commission, the newly-arrived Jetfire takes command - and seriously underestimates the Decepticons. But on the verge of defeat, Optimus reveals a new ability.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Detection
programme.desc: On the moon, Thrust continues his plotting with Megatron. On earth, despite Jetfire saying he's one of the good guys, the kids are suspicious of Sideways - as are the Decepticons. And something huge and ominous is approaching earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Awakening
programme.desc: The massive Tidalwave joins the Decepticons, but is, seemingly, defeated in battle by Hot Shot and Blurr. Alexis discovers three new minicons, which Sideways says combine to create another ultimate weapon, the Requiem Blaster.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Desperate
programme.desc: The kids try to gather the three Requiem Blaster minicons together. Sky Blast at first resists, then sings the others to him to save Optimus. They all realise there's more to the minicons than first appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Runaway
programme.desc: Understanding that the minicons want to be in charge of their own destinies, the kids sneak the new team out of the base. Thrust finds them, but so do the Autobots who save the day. It's agreed the minicons should not be forced to fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Past, Part 1
programme.desc: Enthusiastic young Sideswipe, Blurr's hero-worshipper, joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him. Wheeljack also arrives on earth, bent on revenge for Hot Shot seemingly abandoning him during a battle on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Past, Part 2
programme.desc: Desperate to make amends to his old friend, Hot Shot allows Wheeljack to shoot him, but this isn't enough. Wheeljack takes Sideswipe hostage, but Hot Shot rescues him. On the moon, Megatron welcomes Wheeljack to the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Megatron sacrifices Starscream, leaving him to face the Autobots alone while the Decepticons infiltrate the Autobot base to capture the Requiem Blaster. Smokescreen sacrifices himself to try to protect the Blaster minicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Regeneration
programme.desc: Hearing Megatron say he is nothing more than disposable cannon fodder, Starscream defects with the Star Sabre. To prove he's genuine, he gives the Autobots details of the moon base. Red Alert works on what's left of Smokescreen.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Rescue
programme.desc: With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base, attempting to rescue all the minicons Megatron has captured and forced into building a spaceship.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mars
programme.desc: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars. Starscream gets there first, but is disabled by Tidalwave. Jetfire rescues him: on the way back Starscream spots and tries to entice the minicon. But first they must get past Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crack
programme.desc: With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Threaten
programme.desc: Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon. Installed on their new ship, the Decepticons test it on a comet - then Megatron orders Starscream to use it to destroy the Autobot base. Problem is, that'll also destroy the earth.

programme.title: Survivorman: Patagonia
programme.desc: Survivorman has always been to teach the right way, the safe way, to instruct outdoor enthusiasts on when not to take chances and not go over the top, to avoid landing themselves in peril.

programme.title: Survivorman: Dangers
programme.desc: Les Stroud packs 25 years of survival knowledge into one 45- minute crash course in this fast-paced new compilation.

programme.title: Survivorman: Canadian Arctic
programme.desc: Les has been equipped with a bare minimum of raw materials to aid him for the next 7 days; a hunk of uncooked seal liver, some oil-rich blubber for heat, a seal hook, three matches, and a knife.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Les plants himself in Bigfoot hot spots across North America, collecting stories and experiences from Bigfoot believers, gathering and examining evidence to debunk the mysteries that surround this ancient legend.

programme.title: Survivorman: Cook Islands, South Pacific
programme.desc: Les, equipped with only his scuba gear, is abandoned by his crew at sea to recreate a frightfully common occurrence; separated from your boat and left alone in the ocean waters.

programme.title: Survivorman: Utah Canyonlands
programme.desc: Stroud will cannibalize the mountain-bike he has ridden into the middle of nowhere. He also has a multi-tool, a magnesium flint stick and an old energy bar that he uses for a purpose other than eating

programme.title: Survivorman: Kalahari
programme.desc: Les has his work cut out for him surviving in the scorching red sands of the Kalahari Desert. With only enough water for four days, Les mimics the Bushmen and sits still in the shade during daylight.

programme.title: Survivorman: Arctic Tundra
programme.desc: In the land of the midnight sun, Survivorman heads in to 72°.46 N – the northern tip of Baffin Island. On-route the boats are surrounded by a pod of orca.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Jungle
programme.desc: Les treks through the thick mountain rainforest to survive on the peak of Grenada's largest active mountain. Mona Monkeys, tarantulas, scorpions, armadillo, parrots and possums all live in this vibrant ecosystem, offering an abundance of food and danger.

programme.title: Survivorman: India
programme.desc: Les takes his survival skills to the Indian subcontinent, where he accidentally stakes out a shelter right in the heart of a tiger's territory.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tierra del Fuego
programme.desc: Les will be dropped into this inhospitable landscape of Tierra del Fuego, Argentina, the easternmost tip of Isla Grande and left to survive with no food, no shelter, no water, and no safety gear or camera crew.

programme.title: Survivorman: Frigate Island
programme.desc: Les first strands himself on an uninhabited island called Frigate an active volcano chain found in the Grenadine Islands deep. Surviving on the island means scouring the shoreline, securing freshwater, building a shelter and making fire.

programme.title: Survivorman: Indonesia Mentawai
programme.desc: Les begins at the island of Siberut. He journeys 9 hours up river by boat, navigating log-jammed river systems and shallow waters, eventually trekking by foot into the heart of the island.

programme.title: Survivorman: Patagonia
programme.desc: Les Stroud travels to Patagonia – one of the most beautiful places on the planet – to teach the right way to take on adventure travel.

programme.title: Survivorman: Where the Myth Began
programme.desc: Les tracks Bigfoot in the ancient red cedar forests of northwest California. This Sasquatch hotspot is renowned for reports of Bigfoot, and the forest is crawling with black bears. Will Les brave its dangers and catch Sasquatch on camera?

programme.title: Survivorman: Oregon
programme.desc: Survivorman Legends tells the real life stories of people who survived: those who suffered terribly but made it through and those who died trying.

programme.title: Survivorman: Plane Crash
programme.desc: For a week, Les will have to survive in the brutally cold and snowy wilderness with only an axe, multi-tool and a single blanket to aid him.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Island
programme.desc: Les journeys to an active volcano chain found in the Grenadine Islands. Stranding himself on an uninhabited island called Frigate, Les is left to survive on his own.

programme.title: Survivorman: Searching the Southwest
programme.desc: Les follows a trail from Texas to Utah in his quest to catch Bigfoot on camera. Locals report encounters in haunted mountains and spooky canyons, and Les applies scientific methods and his survival skills to lure the legend out of hiding.

programme.title: Survivorman: Hidden World of Bigfoot
programme.desc: Les jumps from forest to forest across North America in search of Sasquatch, returning to a legendary Bigfoot hotspot in the Canadian wild. Here, he'll use a brand-new approach to discover whether there's any way to explain mysterious noises in the night.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The search for the killer of two teenagers in Texas shows how behavioural studies and intuition, backed up by scientific testing, can lead to the right result.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1992, the residents of Seattle were living in fear of a serial arsonist who had set fire to more than 100 homes. Who was this pyromaniac and how did the police catch him?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: It started as a fairy tale: boy meets girl, they fall in love, get engaged and she falls pregnant. What if he then plots her death and tries to poison her?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: To his neighbours, Faryion Wardrip was a good natured Sunday school teacher, but he was also a brutal serial killer, and a discarded cup brought about his capture.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia police were called to an abandoned car and found the female driver's dead body the following day. Unusual marks on her corpse led police to the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a Presbyterian minister called 911, medics found his wife dying in the bathtub, having ingested large quantities of medication. Was it murder or suicide?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A girl on her way back from a rock concert blew a tyre on her truck. The police found the vehicle, but no trace of her. Three years later, they made a grisly discovery.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young dancer was elated to gain a place at the Houston High School for Performing Arts, but she fell in with a bad crowd, and suddenly disappeared without a trace.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss Jr had it all family, friends and a thriving business. Until his health began to deteriorate. Tests revealed he was being poisoned, but by whom?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a six year old disappeared, her father was the prime suspect. He failed a polygraph test, and even confessed, but ten years on the investigation was turned on its head.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's naked body, covered with bruises, leaves no doubt that she was the victim of foul play. Investigators erect a makeshift tent around the body and use Super Glue fumes to lift the killer's palm print from the victim's skin.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a Texas man's mail order bride disappeared, it was suspicious. When it was revealed his two previous wives both died in mysterious circumstances, it was murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An elderly couple were bludgeoned to death in their home, with no suspects found. Years later, a pawn shop owner made a chance discovery that led directly to the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a nine year old girl was taken from her home and murdered, forensic scientists uncovered a trail to a suspect who was the same man who anonymously called 911.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The disappearance of a young woman leads police to a man with a criminal history, but with no body, there can be no arrest until they discover a charred tooth.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A wealthy woman died suddenly, but investigators were stumped, with evidence of foul play. Until the ex-wife of the bereaved husband called to make suspicious claims.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A rich elderly woman is murdered, her home ransacked. A trail of blood is left on the stairs. Investigators life prints, but only hunt the killer down 16 years later.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In Miami, a sniper opened fire from the roof of a factory. When police found the gun, the serial number had been scratched off. How did they trace the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a serial killer was terrorising the city of St Louis, the FBI didn't need lab tests, fingerprints of any of the usual methods. All they needed was a computer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Using geographical profiling, investigators close in on a serial rapist, and a cleverly obtained DNA sample confirms their suspicions.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a mother becomes ill while travelling in an airplane, the toxic substance specialist seated next to her suspects her home might be making her and her family sick.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The murder of a respected surgeon in a waterfront apartment community left police in St Petersburg, Florida baffled. Who would have wanted the doctor dead?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Bob Dorotik's body was found on a mountain road near his ranch. His wife told police that Bob had gone jogging and never returned, but investigators had their doubts.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Sheila Bryan was convicted of killing her own mother in a car fire, and sentenced to life in prison. Uncover the story of her appeal for freedom.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When Shari Faye Smith was abducted by her murderer, her family received a letter he'd forced her to write, entitled last will and testament. Could the police catch her killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, the case pitted teams of toxicologists against each other, trying to find out if it was murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a 12 year-old was found dead in her own home, police were left clueless until a string of burglaries months later. Could a trail of stolen goods help solve a murder?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When 15 year-old Marlene Miller was murdered, it would take 24 years and several retrials before forensic scientists discovered the evidence to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later. Can forensic handwriting experts help detectives solve the case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just days before she is to testify against a robber. Can a local physics professor help police clean up CCTV footage of her killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just the sunshine. A rash of robberies on tourists would lead to a murder. Could a bite mark help to solve the case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, investigators find a bite mark on the victim which leads to an arrest. Ten years later, questions are raised about the forensic technique used.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman supposedly drowns in Pennsylvania and police link their investigation to a similar death in North Carolina. Can they find a suspect in a case of double murder?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A nurse discovers she is HIV-positive. Find out how science was able to determine her symptoms and how her contracting of the illness wasn't an accident.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When two teenage girls were attacked and their friend murdered, police were left baffled until one simple, yet rarely found, clue helped them track the footsteps of the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a man is found shot dead in his home, his wife is a suspect. She claims she was camping with her lover, but can medical detectives use a novel technique to prove otherwise?

programme.title: Mega Builders: Extreme Surf Machine
programme.desc: Although Christoph Kiessling is now running “the best waterpark in the world” with the world’s largest artificial wave - it’s still not enough. This megalomaniac millionaire is always dreaming of bigger and better things.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Spanning the Saigon River
programme.desc: In Ho Chi Minh City (formerly known as Saigon), engineers are on a mission to modernize. Construction is underway to raise Phu My Bridge, a brand-new $100 million cable-stayed bridge.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Rungis Food Market
programme.desc: Rungis International Market is the world's largest wholesale market for fresh produce. Fish, meat, fruits, vegetables, cheese and even fresh flowers are sold here every day in quantities so large an entire train station.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Shinjuku Station
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes of the world’s busiest station: Shinjuku Station! Five separate train lines, almost three thousand passengers per minute and trains arriving every second.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Munich Airport
programme.desc: The Munich based Franz Joseph Strauss Airport is rated the only 5-Star airport in Europe. And it is also one of Europe´s biggest hubs. An average 1.100 flights have to be taken care of every day, 44.6 million passengers chose Munich as destination.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: UPS Worldport
programme.desc: What does it take to deliver millions of packages and documents every day right in time? You need a Giant Hub: UPS Worldport in Louisville is a technological marvel. It is the largest automated package handling facility in the world.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Moscow Metro
programme.desc: It is one of the biggest and busiest metro systems in the world: The Moscow Metro. During rush hour the trains are running every 90 seconds to transport around 9 million people daily – that makes 2.3 billion a year.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Port of Rotterdam
programme.desc: The Port of Rotterdam is among the largest logistics centers in the world. With a handling capacity of about one million three hundred thousand tons – per day!

programme.title: Mega Builders: Bangkok Bridge
programme.desc: The new 13-km Industrial Ring Road will be a combination of elevated roads, bridges and tunnels, designed to help ease the congestion in Bangkok.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Ice Hotel: Bigger, Colder
programme.desc: Building an eighty-room hotel of snow and ice in just six weeks every year isn’t a big problem for Ake Larsson, but the weather certainly is.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Peak Power
programme.desc: Deep in Canada's rugged western coastal mountains a new hydroelectric project is underway. It's a 600 million dollar venture diverting massive glacial rivers into a huge pipeline built against down steep mountain slopes.

programme.title: Mega Builders: World's Biggest Wave Machine
programme.desc: On the resort island of Tenerife, just off the coast of North Africa, a small army of designers and labourers are building what will be the largest man-made surfing wave in history - and one of the most ambitious waterparks ever conceived.

programme.title: Mega Builders: World Class Stadium
programme.desc: South Africa has a lot riding on being the host of the next FIFA World Cup. It's important and prestigious. Cape Town is building a brand-new stadium for the occasion - with a challenging high-tech roof.

programme.title: Mega Builders: The Big Lift
programme.desc: In a city known for building big, Hong Kong is about to set the standard for bridges around the world. But it’s not just its massive 300 metre towers or 1 kilometre span across open water that will set Stonecutters Bridge apart from other bridges.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Tunneling Through History
programme.desc: Deep beneath the layers of bones, broken pottery and foundations of ancient mosques and early Christian churches, the final TBM is about to emerge after tunneling through the last underground station.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Superyachts
programme.desc: Transporting a ship by a ship - this becomes necessary when the super-rich want their super yacht available on the other side of the world, but do not want to sail it there themselves.

programme.title: Mega Transports: ITER Magnet
programme.desc: This giant magnet will revolutionize the world and energy production in the future. The world's largest nuclear fusion reactor is currently under construction in southern France.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Drilling Rig
programme.desc: A brand-new oil rig, worth 500 million dollar, has to go from South Korea to Europe. The problem is that it is too gigantic for a heavy transport vessel. The solution is to tow it.

programme.title: Wardens: In The Drink
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens deal with some of the many water issues they deal with including littering, under- age drinking, and the annual Yellowstone Boat Float.

programme.title: Wardens: Warrants & Weed
programme.desc: This week, game wardens deal with repeat offenders and people with outstanding warrants that only make matters worse when confronted.

programme.title: Wardens: Cheeseheads
programme.desc: This week, game wardens are looking for poachers and those not hunting within the law, all with a little help from full size decoys and local citizens calling in to the TIP-MONT hotline.

programme.title: Wardens: Three-Fifty-Seven
programme.desc: This week, game wardens try and track down a potential poacher who took a deer out of season. Then, we'll follow another warden as he takes his son hunting when his son draws a hard to come by moose tag.

programme.title: Wardens: Mercy Kill
programme.desc: Warden Kambic investigates a wounded elk and the hunter who tried to do the right thing.

programme.title: Wardens: Tangled
programme.desc: A wounded deer has locked horns with another buck creating a dilemma for Warden Burroughs.

programme.title: Wardens: 18 Minutes
programme.desc: On this episode, the Wardens investigate a possible elk harassment case, and a possible poaching in Montana.

programme.title: Wardens: Thin Ice
programme.desc: This week on Wardens, Nick Taylor responds to a call about duck hunters shooting duck over thin ice. Then, Bryan Golie keeps an eye on the Bear Tooth Game Range on opening morning of elk season.

programme.title: Wardens: 700 Yards
programme.desc: On this episode of Wardens, Joe Kambic patrols Deer Lodge, Montana and Kqyn Kuka attempts to rescue a sick buck from the ice.

programme.title: Wardens: Sullivan Hill
programme.desc: This week on Wardens, its elk hunting season in Montana and Bryan Golie is after suspicious hunters, and Paul Luepke addresses two hunters shot mule deer does without the proper permits.

programme.title: Wardens: Log Jam
programme.desc: Dangerous log jams on the Flathead River threaten unprepared boaters and tubers.

programme.title: Wardens: Casting Doubt
programme.desc: A slew of un-licensed anglers catch the attention of Game Wardens.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Wildfire
programme.desc: This week on Wardens, we're tracking down a pesky bear who has been digging through the neighbors trash. In another region, we're citing several people for fishing without a license.

programme.title: Wardens: Never Ending Day
programme.desc: The Warden's day starts early with an opportunity to capture a convicted game violator who has dodged the law for over 3 years. But just as one case closes another begins - forcing them to work late into the night.

programme.title: Wardens: Angry Like a Moose
programme.desc: Region 4 Wardens are called in to round up a 1000 pound bully. But this youngster is not leaving the safety of his home. The Wardens turn to drastic measures to secure the situation.

programme.title: Wardens: River Rescue
programme.desc: Region 1 Wardens come across a squatter on public land that leaves them speechless. And Region 5 Wardens are on high alert at the annual Yellowstone River Boat Float.

programme.title: Wardens: Failure To Tag
programme.desc: Birds, bucks and missing licenses. This week the Wardens watch a clear violation take place in Region 5. Property lines are crossed in pursuit of upland game and a license check comes up empty.

programme.title: Behind Bars The Worlds Toughest Prisons: Miami, Dade County Jail Boot Camp, Miami, Florida, USA
programme.desc: The toughest divisions of the Miami Dade: Boot Camp gives minor offenders a chance to escape the prison through unforgiving drills and rules. To many it is a better alternative to The M-D County Jail where murderers and rapists have their own rules.
programme.sub-title: Miami, Dade County Jail Boot Camp, Miami, Florida, USA

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Your Money or Your Life?
programme.desc: The 70s and 80s saw a change in activity for criminal fraternities. Following the sentencing of the Krays, many gangs turned to armed robbery. Villains saw the banks and armoured cars that transported huge amounts of cash as relatively easy pickings.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Live By The Sword
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney explores the injustices suffered by those who have unwittingly surrounded themselves with criminals. Do these people always deserve the harsh legal consequences and should society turn its back on them for their mistakes?

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a mysterious young girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy McNally connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.
programme.sub-title: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Class Dismissed
programme.desc: As local high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of an armed police car. While tracking down the stolen vehicle, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a volatile teen boy

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Good Shoot
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a young black teenager.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girl’s Night Out
programme.desc: On Traciʼs first day as a detective, all hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver. Jerry discovers that the driver of the parked car was dead before the accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Messy Houses
programme.desc: While answering a domestic disturbance call, Andyʼs personal life is turned inside out when the social worker on the scene turns out to be her estranged mother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe -- a homeless squatter whoʼs been stabbed in the warehouse

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: When a gifted psychic - or, at the very least, a gifted conman - enters 15 Division to help find the missing witness in an organized-crime case, the officers are forced to come face-to-face with some of the hidden truths

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a grad-student-turned escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women. Since Gail fits the physical description of the victims, she is sent on an undercover sting at a high-end hotel

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Out Of Time
programme.desc: After the officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator, the grim discovery of the body of a missing girl reopens an unsolved case – bringing back Detective Luke Callaghan in from the Homicide Squad to oversee it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Cold Comforts
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are still reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues. When they discover that a laptop has been stolen containing sensitive information, they set out to tie up several of open cases

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Rules
programme.desc: Itʼs “back to basics” for 15 Division when Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides itʼs time for his officers to get back on track

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Every Man
programme.desc: A seasonʼs worth of trials and tribulations come to a head during a frenzied night at the station when the distracted rookies improperly search a prisoner

programme.title: Rookie Blue: I Never
programme.desc: When a violent child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal -- only to discover that heʼs taken another young victim

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Surprises
programme.desc: After six months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick, then Andy go missing. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the investigation-turned-rescue-mission

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Skeletons
programme.desc: When a young woman is reported missing, the officers of 15 Division soon discover a possible copycat connection to one of their division’s most distressing cases. With the clock ticking, Gail must face her worst fears..

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: A workaholic billionaire (Kevin Spacey) tries to communicate with his family when a bizarre turn of events traps him inside the body of a cat named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: The Journey Home
programme.desc: A boy tries to reunite a polar bear cub with its mother in northern Canada.

programme.title: Against the Wild
programme.desc: Two siblings and their dogs become lost in the wilderness and combine their skills to survive.

programme.title: Jericho
programme.desc: A charismatic preacher rescues a mysterious gunman who tries to find the answers to his lost identity.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A young man (Taylor Lautner) must run for his life soon after learning that the folks who raised him are not his real parents.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: After their ship is torpedoed by a Japanese submarine, the crew members of the USS Indianapolis face a harrowing nightmare as their ship goes down in the shark infested Philippine Sea.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of a pyromaniac mutant who is causing mayhem, while Shalimar is forced to set aside her fear of fire to save Emma.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team wrestles to contain Brennan's out-of-control mutant powers when he puts the mission to protect a senator's daughter in danger.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Shalimar gets into trouble when the team encounters a Cold War-era mutant with the ability to alter reality and destroy people's minds.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team helps the crew of an ocean research station threatened by a prehistoric creature previously thought to be extinct.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Shalimar reluctantly agrees to contact her estranged father when the team learns his company is involved in genetic testing and manipulation.

programme.title: Flash Gordon Conquers the Universe: The Land of the Dead
programme.desc: Flash Gordon, Dale Arden and Dr. Zarkov return to the planet Mongo for an antidote to the Purple Death, which wreaking destruction on Earth. However, Ming the Merciless has other plans for them.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: A Little Bit of Heaven
programme.desc: Liam and Renee investigate a dead pregnant woman missing her fetus. They discover a town that Da'an helped after a nuclear meltdown and a suspicious brother and sister who were part of an early experiment to combine human and Taelon DNA.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Pad'ar
programme.desc: Pad'ar is a fierce battle game where spectators can connect via a "jack patch" that Liam suspects is causing neurological damage to users. When a Pad'ar warrior dies, it raises even more questions about the safety.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: In Memory
programme.desc: Lili wakes up, supposedly on Earth after a coma, and is told the Jaridians have come and conquered the Taelons. She remembers Sandoval telling her she no longer has and Earth-based physiology and believes things are not as they seem.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Cloister
programme.desc: Zo'or and Da'an travel to a cloister for an energy sharing ceremony, but one of the sisters is killed and everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Interview
programme.desc: Zo'or agrees to do a live television interview to try to endear himself to humans, but the show's producer has an ulterior motive in getting him in front of a camera.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Keep Your Enemies Closer
programme.desc: The shuttle Liam and Zo'or are in crashes over wilderness, but survive in safety bubbles. The people they meet live off the earth and know nothing of the Taelons. However, Zo'or is injured and missing a Synod meeting on the mother ship.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Subterfuge
programme.desc: Sandoval has a mole attempting to gain information about Liam - particularly concerning his commitment to the Taelons. When a Taelon and protector are killed in a portal that malfunctions, Liam is suspicious that it was intentional.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Scorched Earth
programme.desc: Bombings begin at embassies and Liam believes they may reignite the SI (Sino-Indian) War, which ended with an armistice several years before. An old intelligence agency friend of Renee's has interesting holographic technology.

programme.title: The Lost World: Quality of Mercy
programme.desc: Veronica and Malone are imprisoned at a labor camp occupied by emotionless prisoners, robotic wardens, and alien rulers called Prin. The explorers must plan a prison break to free their cohorts.

programme.title: The Lost World: Mark of the Beast
programme.desc: Marguerite and Roxton discover a strange amulet that leaves the mark of a dinosaur on their skin. Those with the imprint begin to tap into their more primitive instincts.

programme.title: The Lost World: Survivors
programme.desc: The explorers discover an ancient Temple, where they face off against mystical and experience hallucinations. One of these visions gives them a map that leads Challenger to William Maple White.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Pirate's Curse
programme.desc: A seismic event opens the earth and send Marguerite and Roxton into a pit, where they discover a pirate's buried treasure...and his bones. A curse on the booty complicates matters.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Visitor
programme.desc: After Malone is attacked by a beast, he and Veronica meet her old friend Danu, who has also been injured. Danu goes missing, and the group travels to his village learning he is a werewolf.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Out Of The Blue
programme.desc: Meet Helen and Will: neighbors on a tree-lined, suburban street. Helen lives alone, dislikes her neighbor’s dog and is a talented painter.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Into The Black
programme.desc: The Sanctuary receives alarming news that a large group of Abnormals has been spotted at the entrance to a cave in South Dakota.

programme.title: 27 Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Strange and bizarre UFO encounters abound, but recent Alien encounters by highly credible eyewitnesses are so unusual and perplexing that they challenge our understanding of physics and the Universe as we know it.

programme.title: Ancient Engineers: Aliens On Earth
programme.desc: Our evolution may be influenced by our ancestors and their Gods. We are not alone in the universe.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Belgian UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Belgian UFO, (Pts. 1 & 2), UD: I.D. Swap, Brenda's Fire and Philip Breen & UD.

programme.title: Alien Mass Sightings: The Undeniable Truth
programme.desc: Documentary analyzes mass alien sightings, questions reliability of official explanations, identifies common patterns for further investigation.

programme.title: Alien Global Threat
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that world governments have had a pact with aliens for decades and that human abductions are being allowed by government and military factions.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Kecksburg UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: Alien Crash Retrievals
programme.desc: Learn the shocking truth about extraterrestrial beings on planet Earth. World governments and military factions are not only aware of the Alien presence; they may be in communication with alien races.

programme.title: UFO Hunters II: Tales from the Universe
programme.desc: Italian ufologists explore alien evidence in history & folklore. Have we been watched since ancient times?

programme.title: Area 51, Roswell Crash, Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Area 51 is located at the center of UFO research and legends of extra-terrestrial folklore. It is located six hundred miles west of Roswell, New Mexico, where the infamous Roswell UFO crashed in 1947. Also in this episode The Allagash Alien Abductions .

programme.title: Alien Cyclops: The Extraordinary Case of Sagrada Familia
programme.desc: In 1963 Brazil, three children witness a UFO in their backyard. An alien cyclops descends, and Mr. Alberto investigates the phenomenon.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: UFO Odyssey
programme.desc: This episode includes: UFO Odyssey, Reporter's Trucker and Haunted Mansion.

programme.title: The Falcon Lake Incident
programme.desc: Aliens visit Earth often; Canada's 1967 Falcon Lake UFO incident stands out. Canada's frequent sightings make it enigmatic.

programme.title: Aliens in the USSR
programme.desc: Unsolved Soviet Union Alien Mysteries: Dyatlov Pass incident, Petrozavodsk miracle, Voronezh case. Amaze and frighten, but doubt of alien involvement.

programme.title: Abducted by Aliens: UFO Encounters of the 4th Kind
programme.desc: Are we being taken by beings from outer space or another dimension? A troubling phenomenon has been occurring for centuries.

programme.title: Alien from Area 51
programme.desc: Footage of a dead alien from a crashed UFO in Roswell, NM and moved to Area 51 shocked the world. The time is coming for alien intervention on Earth whether we are ready or not.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jay, Sketch and Alice face Scott's manscaping stickmen, Chelsea's superfan signature, and Jack's silly souvenir. Meanwhile, fun-loving divorcee Kat, partygoing parents Kay and Richard, and diabetic Sean all go under the needle.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 8
programme.desc: Jay conjures up an Amy Winehouse masterpiece, Alice crafts an amazing geometric wolf and sketch creates matching tattoos for Amy and Chantelle. Also looking for tattoo therapy is Wonky-eyed Shannon, gambling man James and Tat mad Dan.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 1
programme.desc: Tattoo Fixers on Holidays is back and this week new arrival Glen banishes bad boy Ashley's Magaluf moto, Sketch helps Bobby get rid of his rank rabbit, Alice gives Rachel a sentimental design, and Jay strips Clair of an awful ex tat.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 4
programme.desc: At the parlour in the sun, Glen meets drunk tattoo collector Jack. Sketch rids Dylan of a reminder of his past & Jay gives Julie a portrait she can cherish forever.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch hides a Kardashian catastrophe, Alice gives Lana's emoji a facelift, and Jay is moved by a family's story of bravery.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 4
programme.desc: Jay, Sketch and Alice are tasked with covering Holly's filthy foot, Vicky's triple nipple, and Josh's romance-ruining wrist, as well as tackling Adam's bawdy butterfly, Dan's drunken decision, and Shannon's blush-worthy birthmark.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 2
programme.desc: Jay is taking on best mates Sam and Laura's cheeky stickmen, Sketch is helping out Aaron with a lads holiday regret and spontaneous Danny's Magaluf mistake is Wrecked'tified.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 7
programme.desc: The Fixers holiday hijinks continue, and this week Glen rids Mandy of her rabbits, Jay pulls off the perfect portrait and Alice gets her teeth into Helen's cupcake.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Sketch covers Chris's boastful nickname, and Glen removes Darren's chat up line leg art.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Sketch rids Ben of a silly spooning tattoo. Jay fixes Matt's backside-based chat-up line.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Jay tackles Mark's Greek tragedy, while Alice helps Lois to celebrate her penguin persona.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Respectable dad Stephen aims to see the back of a crude tattoo he had 20 years ago. Tattoo-mad ex-solider Rob's phallic self-portrait is a step too far, and Leeanneah has lyrics tattooed on her chest.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Scott's terrible tattoo takes his love for Norwich City FC too far. Jay has space-loving Dan's back with an out-of-this-world cover. Sketch tackles a cover to help transgender Jai feel more feminine.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Eccentric dancer Marina wants a confidence-boosting tattoo cover to get her back onto the podium. The artists see double when identical twins Hayley and Rebecca come in with matching bad body art.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: Lisa pays tribute to her idol Robbie Williams, while Jack covers his literal leg tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Glen tackles Hannah's four-letter faux pas, and Jay gives firefighter Simon a hot design.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Jay covers Jack's offensive nickname tatt, while Sketch sweeps away Mark's cobwebs.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Eccentric dancer Marina wants a confidence-boosting tattoo cover to get her back onto the podium. The artists see double when identical twins Hayley and Rebecca come in with matching bad body art.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A visit to a secretive production facility in Sweden to look at the Koenigsegg Regera, a Swedish supercar. Titch Cormack lifts the lid on the world's first supercar, the Jaguar XK120.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Take a behind-the-scenes tour of Bugatti's production facility in Molsheim. Plus, Titch Cormack uncovers a luxury car from the 1920s: the Rolls Royce Silver Ghost.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A grand tour of the Ferrari Roma production facility in Northern Italy. Titch lifts the lid on an icon of the sixties, the series one Jaguar E-type.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: The armoured BMW X5 is the perfect hybrid of when armoured cars meet supercars. Titch Cormack reveals just what it takes to design and build a car that can come under enemy attack.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A visit to the Croatian production facility of the Rimac C Two. Titch Cormack hits the jackpot when he discovers a barn full of a game-changing technically advanced Aston Martin Lagonda's.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: It's all about feeling the wind in your hair as the lid is lifted on the Pagani Huayra Roadster BC. Take a look behind the scenes at the production facility in Northern Italy with founder and Chief Designer Horacio Pagani.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Explores a variety of off-road vehicles, including the modern Land Rover Defender. In addition, Titch Cormack travels to Cornwall to uncover the story behind the Second World War's Willys Jeep.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: It was believed that part of the Nazi party was involved and influenced in all manner of occult beliefs from their uniforms to their huge rallies.
programme.sub-title: The Nazi Belief in the Occult

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Cutting-edge investigations at the Bermuda Triangle might confirm the newest theories of what really goes on in this deadly stretch of water.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The Vatican is home to classified files that could reveal top-secret ties to the Nazis, the Mafia, and extraterrestrials. Using new evidence, experts investigate just what else is hiding in the Vatican's secret archives.
programme.sub-title: The Secret World of the Vatican

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: In Salem, Mass., access to mysterious sites reveals the secret history of the mass hysteria and lurid trials that led to the executions of 20 innocent people; new evidence challenges what people know about this strange place.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations in the Holy Land unearth fresh evidence that reveals new secrets about the life of Moses, and using hi-tech science, experts are rethinking everything they know about this renowned prophet.
programme.sub-title: The Search for the Real Moses

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Mysterious crystal skulls could be long-lost relics of the Aztec and Maya civilisations that grant supernatural powers. Experts investigate new leads to reveal if these strange objects are genuine artefacts or simply modern-day fakes.
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Crystal Skulls

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Ancient pyramids are among the greatest wonders of the world and exist across many civilisations, explore the origins of these structures as experts question if they were independently constructed or perhaps the design of something more mysterious.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics attend an accident at a bus station, treat a feisty pensioner who has angina, a young mum with a suspected stroke, and a child hit by a cricket bat.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In Dudley, paramedics attend a road accident, while in Stoke, the crews work out how to move a woman with a bad fracture, and answer a call from a woman whose carer has fainted.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedic crews are called to an unconscious child in a park, a seriously unwell man with blood in his colostomy bag, and a deaf woman with chest pains.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews reassure a frightened elderly patient with a dislocated hip, treat a baby with a dangerously high temperature, attend a woman with a fast heart rate and help an alcoholic.

programme.desc: The blue lights are flashing as the crews attend a woman with dangerously high blood pressure, a 20-year-old with chest pains, and a woman who has smashed her face in a fall.
