programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: It's going downhill fast in northern Italy, where 65 nutty teams pit their wacky homemade racers against a 500m-long track. Will any petrol-free motor be a runaway success?

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Holland isn't known for its steep inclines, but things are going downhill fast in Valkenburg as racers pit their wacky, engineless roadsters against a perilous course!

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: With a total disregard for their welfare, amateur drivers hurtle down Cincinnati's steep streets in their nutty homemade contraptions. Makes for great TV though!

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: The Lewis Hamiltons of the future - alright, maybe that's pushing it - race their gravity-powered motors through the streets of Barcelona. Big crashes guaranteed!

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Amateur drivers get on their soapboxes in the gravity-powered motor race.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: It's back! The welcome return of the global event in which daredevil drivers tackle perilous courses in their wacky homemade soapbox vehicles. The action kicks off in Paris.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Craft, creativity and lots of crashes as the motorless mayhem continues! Crews of enterprising amateur racers steer their screwball soapboxes through the streets of Seattle.

programme.desc: Hypothetical is a back and more absurd than ever. Josh Widdicombe and James Acaster pose ridiculous Hypothetical scenarios to Suzi Ruffell, Tom Allen, Sophie Duker and Desiree Burch.

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Supercat
programme.desc: Fab 5 Freddy interviews Supercat about the dancehall genre and moving to America from Jamaica

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Ode To The Cornball
programme.desc: Ed Lover and Dr. Dre talk the latest music videos.

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Das EFX
programme.desc: Fab 5 Freddy interviews Das EFX underground about their music, being authentic, and performing in Europe

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Wu Tang Clan
programme.desc: Fab 5 Freddy interviews Wu-Tang Clan about their origins, style, and music on the set of their new music video

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: 3 Times Dope
programme.desc: Fab 5 Freddy visits iconic spots in Philly with3 Times Dope, and several other local rappers meet up with them

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Public Enemy Week
programme.desc: Ed Lover and Dr. Dre sit down with Chuck D and Terminator X.

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Eric B and Rakim
programme.desc: Ed Lover interviews Eric B. about changes with Eric B. & Rakim, and they perform "Juice" live

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Heavy D
programme.desc: Heavy D hangs out on set with Ed Lover and Doctor Dré, and performs "You Can't See What I Can See" live

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Countdown With NWA
programme.desc: Ed Lover and Dr. Dre Countdown the top videos of the week.

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: The Last Show

programme.desc: Eddie Murphy discusses his new movie 'Boomerang' and his 'Love's Alright' album

programme.desc: Nas discusses his origins and creative process with Fab 5 Freddy in a music studio

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Lady of Rage

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Mary J Blige

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 5
programme.desc: In tonight’s show a team called The Cheerleaders, five disproportionately excitable young ladies, hope enthusiasm will help them in their quest through the maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight’s team are huge fans of the original series and have engaged in intensive research on how to tackle the challenges ahead. Sometimes all the preparation in the world can be utterly pointless.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 6
programme.desc: Tonight's team are The Science Nerds, proving that just because you put the words 'science' and 'nerds' in the name of your team does not necessarily mean anyone should expect competence.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Watsons. How will they cope when one of the team reveals they ‘can’t physically do riddles’?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 11
programme.desc: This week’s team are Black Ice, an AC/DC tribute band from Newcastle. Will they rock the maze or will the physical, mystery, skill and mental challenges prove to be a highway to hell?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 1 - Big Narstie, Kelly, Greg, Jorgie, Alfie
programme.desc: Olympic legend Dame Kelly Holmes takes charge of grime MC Big Narstie, actress Jorgie Porter, internet superstar Alfie Deyes and fellow gold medallist Greg Rutherford on an action-packed journey to the Crystal Dome.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 1 - Big Narstie, Kelly, Greg, Jorgie, Alfie

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 9
programme.desc: Pop star and captain Fleur East leads this thespian filled episode of the Crystal Maze guiding actors John Thompson, Nina Wadia and Natalie Cassidy as well as realty TV’s Georgia “Toff” Toffolo on a wild ride full of twists and turns in every zone.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 2
programme.desc: Maze Master Richard Ayoade is convinced that all successful teams entering the maze are captained by women. Will presenter Anita Rani be the first to fail spectacularly?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 4 - Joe, Radzi, Kate, Ashley, Richard
programme.desc: This week broadcasting legend Richard Madeley captains his team featuring comedian Joe Wilkinson, broadcaster Kate Garraway, Blue Peter’s Radzi Chinyanganya, and Pussycat Dolls star Ashley Roberts.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 4 - Joe, Radzi, Kate, Ashley, Richard

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight's celebrity adventurers are Spencer Matthews, Stacey Solomon, Tom Allen, Andrea McLean and Joe Swash.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 6
programme.desc: This week’s intrepid band of celebrity Mazekateers are ably led by ‘dad vibe’ BAFTA winning actor and League Of Gentlemen lynchpin Steve Pemberton. Hot stepping support comes in the form of Strictly’s Oti Mabuse and Naked Attraction’s Anna Richardson.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 3
programme.desc: Crystal Maze team captain actor Nancy Sorrell leads her fellow adventurers, comedian Jim Moir (AKA: Vic Reeves), reality TV’s Ferne McCann, former cricketer Graeme Swann and comedian Susan Calman, on a wild ride through the 4 zones.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 3 - David, Wayne, Rachel, Charlotte, Judy
programme.desc: Judy Murray captains a team of celebs hoping to ace their way to the Crystal Dome. Paralympic David Weir, footballer Wayne Bridge, Countdown's Rachel Riley and TV’s Charlotte Crosby all combine to tackle skill, physical, mystery and mental challenges.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 3 - David, Wayne, Rachel, Charlotte, Judy

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 2 - Dennis, Katie, Bez Roman, Binky
programme.desc: Former footballer Dennis Wise captains a celebrity team including DJ Roman Kemp, Made in Chelsea's Binky Felstead, Happy Mondays maraca shaker Bez, and published author Katie Price.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 2 - Dennis, Katie, Bez Roman, Binky

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 12
programme.desc: TV presenter Laura Whitmore Captains her team; comedian Chris Ramsey, dancers Perri Kiely and Jordan Banjo, and retired rugby player Gareth Thomas into a world of physical, mental, skilful and mysterious challenges.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 4
programme.desc: This gathering of the Crystal Maze is captained by actor Sunetra Sarker as she pilots plucky TV broadcaster Matthew Wright, seasoned politician Anne Widdecombe actor Nikki Sampson and reality TV Hunk Wes Nelson.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 11
programme.desc: This week Pop star Faye Tozer steps up as team captain of the latest celebrity supergroup to tackle the crystal maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 8
programme.desc: This show sees DJ Matt Edmondson lead his teammates TV legend Debbie McGee, dancer Kimberley Wyatt, retired footballer Michael Owen and reality TV star Chris Hughes.

programme.title: Mob Wives starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Welcome to Staten Island, the land of fierce women who never admit to being allegedly "connected" - until now. Left alone to pick up the pieces, these women face the harsh realities of "life" after informants have turned their families' lives upside down.

programme.title: Mob Wives: The Realest B*!ch is Back
programme.desc: Emotions run high and Staten Island is rife with gossip, lies, and misunderstandings. In this world, you never know what's around the corner - or when an old family connection may resurface to shake everything up.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Storm A-Brewin'
programme.desc: Karen and Natalie continue to face off at Big Ang's party igniting an even bigger rivalry between them. After the mayhem at her bar Ang is fed up with the girls and seeks some much needed advice from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Attacking in broad daylight, the `M25 Rapist' became synonymous with fear and triggered one of the biggest manhunts in British history. All the police had to go on was a trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: 'Conned to Death' covers the murder of Michele MacNeill and how investigators and forensics brought her killer to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Kelsey Berreth vanishes on Thanksgiving in 2018, blood in her house and cell phone records indicate that there is more to Kelsey's disappearance than meets the eye.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into a body found in a plastic container and how the killer is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The terrifying assault of Ronda Guzman and the investigation that reveals her attacker after 33 years.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the 35-year investigation and forensic advances that identify Rosa's savage killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation that reveals the predator responsible for numerous sexual assaults.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a sadistic crime and how investigators brought the merciless attacker to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of Shelby Weatherly, and how the police caught her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation to catch a serial rapist and how advanced DNA technology finally tracked him down.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a double-homicide and how dedicated police work, alongside forensics, solved the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: How investigators uncovered what happened in the moments leading up to the death of Jchandra Brown.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The death of an innocent mother and how detectives identified her killer and proved his guilt.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: An innocent victim was lured to his death and cutting edge forensics helped to find the killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Mary Ann Perez left a bar just outside of New Orleans. Early the next morning, her family received a call from an anonymous woman, mentioning Mary had run into car trouble. She never returned home.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the tragic murder of Brett Wentworth, how police tracked his killer down and how advanced forensic technology was key to solving the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Wendy Speakes was found dead wearing a strangers' shoes, police launched an investigation into who could have murdered a well-loved member of a quiet community.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Sharon Whelan and her two daughters were murdered in their home on Christmas eve by a cold and calculating killer. Multi-discipline forensics uncovered his horrific actions and brought him to justice.
programme.sub-title: The Murders of Sharon, Zarah and Nadia Whelan

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The Murder of Imette St Guillen explores the hours and events leading up to her horrific death and the large-scale police investigation that identified her killer.
programme.sub-title: The Murder of Imette St Guillen

programme.title: South Park: Die Hippie, Die
programme.desc: Die Hippie, Die: Cartman runs a 'pest control' service to rid the town of hippies and is soon arrested, but when a plague of hippies invades South Park the town turn to him and his methods. (S9, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: Wing: The boys become talent agents to make an easy buck. They take on a Chinese lady named Wing and are soon confronted by the Chinese mafia, looking for a slice of the action. Fight! (S9, E03)

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of the semi-final round of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including highlights and interviews surrounding the Pinball Trial and Arena battle events.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage of the second semi-final of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', beginning with recaps of the second group of six competitors to reach that stage of the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Four robotic warriors have battled their way to the Grand Final. The other competitors have been sent to a scrapheap. A look at what it's like behind the scenes of the most intense stage of the competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Battle of the Stars
programme.desc: Olympic athletes' the Brownlee brothers, DJ Scott Mills, space scientist Dr Maggie Aderin-Pocock and sport's presenter Suzi Perry help design their own fighting robots to battle it out in the bulletproof Robot Wars arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Two of the most famous roboteers make their debuts - Roger Plant, the captain of team Big Cheese, and Nick Adams, the captain of The Adams Family.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More robots go into battle, with only a pair of 12V batteries to power them.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: In the first semi-final, the remaining robots have to pair off and fight to the death.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Gauntlet makes its final appearance in the second semi-final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Four survivors come together in the ultimate home-made robotic showdown - and only one of them can claim victory.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight more robots battle to win the last available place in the semi-final.
programme.sub-title: The Second Wars: The Grudge Matches

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A compilation of highlights to end the series in which contestants guide home-made robots through mechanical challenges.
programme.sub-title: The Second Wars: The Best Of Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An insightful behind-the-scenes look into how the second season of `Robot Wars' was made.
programme.sub-title: The Second Wars: Making of Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Dogs enter the ring as they munch and crunch their way into victory. Some will let off steam while others sends out flames of destruction.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The competitors waste no time getting stuck into the fray in the four way melees, with one robot seemingly dominating the competition. The house robots may be a little rusty as a robot launches an attack.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Heat C welcomes back familiar faces in the arena, as former champions return with old tricks up their sleeves.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Sir Chromalot returns to the arena to take on seven other mean machines. Steve must raise its previous form to send others tumbling.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The robots battle it out to send the crowd wild and their competition to robot heaven. Plus, 259 proves to be a genuine top contender.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Both old and new contenders must endure and evade the traps in the arena, full of flippers and pits. Meanwhile, Demolition Man is on a mission.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Tornado proves to be a strong contender in the arena, while house robots test the strength of newbies and push their limit.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: To qualify as semifinalists, contenders must emerge from the hustle of the house robots and survive the dance of death.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The arena is full of the bizarre and the befuddled as contenders are axed, tossed, and crushed. Only the strongest will survive.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One semifinalist goes through to the next round with only three spots left. House robots like Growler make things difficult as they attempt to thwart the challengers' quests for victory.

programme.title: A Haunting: Living Nightmare
programme.desc: Angela, a newlywed, is excited to start her new life with Stephen when nightmares that she experienced as a child suddenly resurface. Soon the menacing old hag from her dreams terrorizes her daughter and takes temporary possession of her son.

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows
programme.desc: A girl commits suicide and her spirit haunts the new tenants.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Presence
programme.desc: Sarah Miller believes that something supernatural in her home is terrorizing her children.

programme.title: A Haunting: Love Curse
programme.desc: When Lee and his new bride Claire settle into their first home, an evil entity emerges and attacks Claire while she's carrying the couple's unborn baby. A ghost hunter determines the dark spirit is a demon and brings in demonologists to cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Spirits of the Dead
programme.desc: The Whitley’s buy a farmhouse that houses a negative presence. The presence turns physical.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer
programme.desc: Georgia single mother Cindy Sauer is finally getting back on her feet after the sudden death of her husband. But as she is recovering from her loss, nightmares and dark shadows haunt the family and mark the beginning of something far worse.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear House
programme.desc: Steven LaChance begins to experience strange things inside his house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Angels And Demons
programme.desc: Maryland single Mom Kathie Sheats hopes life will change for the better when she marries her boyfriend Brian. But "something" inside her house has other ideas. Spiritual warfare literally breaks out...taking over Kathie's mind, body and soul.

programme.title: A Haunting: Stalked by Evil
programme.desc: A shadowy presence manifests from the darkened corners of Judy McCarthy’s Texas home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Victorian
programme.desc: After moving in their dream home, Edwin Gonzalez and Lillian Otero begin to experience strange occurrences; mysterious footsteps and unexplained noises. Lillian is physically attacked while sleeping and the couple tries to escape, but is it too late?

programme.title: A Haunting: Monster in the Apartment
programme.desc: A ghost attacks Morgan Knudsen in order to drive her out and get to her friend Bob.

programme.title: A Haunting: Trapped In Terror
programme.desc: Soon after moving into an older home in a quaint suburb of Cincinnati, OH, Taylor Jones catches her mother practicing black magic in her daughter Isabelle’s bedroom. Her fears become reality when Taylor notices Isabelle playing with an invisible friend.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Romie moves into a new home but begins to have nightmares and see shadowy spirits pacing.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear Feeders
programme.desc: Soon after Al Gonzalez purchases a home outside Fort Wayne, Indiana, he begins to hear strange noises and sees unexplainable shadows. Paranormal investigators determine the entities in Al's home are dangerous and that he is not their first victim.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demons Never Die
programme.desc: Shortly after starting a new job and moving his family to the suburbs, Bill Toler suspects his house is haunted. Paranormal investigators uncover a portal in their home and discover a demon followed Bill home from his job at the state penitentiary.

programme.title: A Haunting: Heartland Horror
programme.desc: Teenager Nolan Lydolph has seen ghosts his entire life. But after he and his parents return home from a ghost tour in Missouri, strange spirits creep through their home. Nolan undertakes a life-threatening struggle to rid his family of an undaunted evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Sallie’s House
programme.desc: Deb and Tony’s son is born and his toys take on a life of their own.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Past
programme.desc: As Deborah Utley begins experiencing paranormal events in her home, she turns to her faith for protection. But when her children are targeted by the entity she seeks the aid of paranormal investigators to end the cycle of terror.

programme.title: Medium: Second Opinion

programme.desc: Allison's brother, a phone-hotline psychic, helps a person whose husband was killed.

programme.sub-title: No One To Watch Over Me

programme.desc: A seven car motorway pile-up leaves a local council's waste truck in trouble. Fluff does his best to shift one of the heaviest loads his vehicle can lift. Meanwhile, Fluff's girlfriend Marta is called to a stranded truck in a quarry.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: A burnt out van abandoned on an isolated towpath presents a serious challenge for Steve and Marta, but the solution comes in the form of a bespoke, bright yellow rescue truck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: A 44 tonne Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Incident Manager Steve and his colleague Pat. Recovery op Steve rescues a broken down dustcart from a busy London street. Recovery op Jim gets drenched as he risks l

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: Things are far from simple for the recovery crews this week. When a loaded HGV suffers a puncture on a busy motorway, Crouch recovery op Jim Howard and heavy vehicle mechanic Jack Watson, are called to the scene.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A digger has fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken down trailer back safely to it

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: At Crouch HQ, there is excitement in the air as the team help to make trucking superfan Chris's wedding day extra special. Snod is called to recover two crashed cars from the side of the M69 - the exact stretch of road that his friend was killed on while

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Dave and Adam are under pressure to recover a 100 tonne train engine before it sinks into the soft ground. Jim has to rescue a lorry that has become stuck in a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A luxury coach gives up the ghost on a busy motorway slip road. A straightforward job segues into disaster for Marta. Scott races to recover a damaged trailer before dark descends.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Jim must rescue a 32-tonne truck from a soft dirt embankment. Chris manouevres a skip lorry out of city centre traffic. Marta is driven around the bend trying to deliver a 48-foot articulated bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: A recycling plant needs two old portable cabins swapped out for new ones, making for some serious heavy lifting for Nick. Jim sees to an old Toyota abandoned in a live lane on the M1.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Jim and his team face a difficult foggy morning on the M1 when a crash between two artics causes a five-mile-long tailback.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: Veteran driver Jim attends an emergency call-out to recover a lorry that has broken down bang in the middle of a busy ring road. Motor racing fanatic Merrie has a hunch she may have landed her dream job when she attends a broken down lorry.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: Steve and the team find themselves in deep water when they attempt to recover a car that has crashed into a river. Jim is tasked with recovering a van that has become wedged on top of a garden wall.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: Steve battles rush hour traffic to manoeuvre his recovery vehicle around the narrow roads to get to a 7.5-tonne lorry out of a ditch, while Rory must deliver a dodgy van to a scrapyard for destruction.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: Lantern's only female driver Merrie is tasked with the removal of an abandoned lorry, but it is soon clear this will not be a routine job. As she takes a closer look, she discovers that not only has the lorry been used as a mobile home, but that it is hou

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: Rory risks life and limb to recovered a skip lorry from the M1. Jim has a happy reunion with his own truck. Chris has to find a way of separating two HGVs that have somehow become wedged together.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: Jim faces mayhem on the motorway when a massive pile-up blocks the busy M1.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Marta and Pat have to pull a bin lorry out of a muddy ditch. But first they must battle their way through a thick wall of thorns.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Travelling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey. Plus, Sokka meets his long-lost father, Azula hatches a diabolical plan, and Uncle and Zuko open a tea shop.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se. Zuko and Katara spend time together, while Aang's destiny hangs in the balance, as does Zuko's.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael, the Turtle of a Thousand Faces
programme.desc: Raphael disguises himself as Mad Dog McNutt, who is planning a heist of the Natural History museum.
programme.sub-title: Raphael, the Turtle of a Thousand Faces

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo, the Renaissance Turtle
programme.desc: Professor Mindbender fools the Mayor into installing Lex, a supercop robot, to clean up crime, but rewires him to arrest practically the whole city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Zach and the Alien Invaders
programme.desc: Zach's over-active imagination has him seeing Aliens everywhere. Sent to Military School, he discovers actual Aliens posing as officers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Welcome Back, Polarisoids!
programme.desc: The Polarisoids return to Earth unwittingly invited by Krang, bringing to life the alien Creatures caught as images on tape as a distraction so Krang can break into the city's computer systems.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtleloids: Part 1
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder transport to the City Wild Animal Park with Bebop and Rocksteady to create an army of Mutants from the animals there.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rock Around the Block
programme.desc: Krang summons General Tragg from the Dimension X to keep the Turtles busy while Shredder places a remote control transmitter upon a rocket ship preparing to launch a satellite with a new super laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Krangenstein Lives
programme.desc: Under the Arctic Ocean Krang is tuning up his Robotic Body. While no one is looking, Bebop and Rocksteady inadvertently destroy an important computer chip and surreptitiously replace it with one from a video game.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are busy trying to decide what costumes to wear to this year's Channel Six Halloween party, April and Irma are doing a story on the reverse polarity magnet at Magno-Dyne Labs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Adventures in Turtle-Sitting
programme.desc: While Splinter is away on meditative satori, Donatello sets his sights on solving world hunger. He invents the food revivafiver, a device designed to reverse the aging process of food.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sword of Yurikawa
programme.desc: Krang plans to blow up the Tri-State Bridge just as a convoy of trucks carrying a rare form of toxic waste passes overhead.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Turtleoid
programme.desc: The Turtles go to the Top Notch Scientific Corporation to stand guard over the sonic disintegrator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shreeka's Revenge
programme.desc: Shreeka, an alien with an attitude and a vendetta against Krang, after having spent eons tracking him down, has finally found him.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Donatello tells the other three Turtles that, based on his calculations, the Earth has changed its orbit and is heading for the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Nightmare in the Lair
programme.desc: Down in the sewers, while Michelangelo, Leonardo, and Raphael are watching yet another cheesy sci-fi film, Donatello is busy building the dream-o-vision.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Phantom of the Sewers
programme.desc: After another night's performance of the robotic Willie Wombat Revue at the Willie Wombat Revue Theatre, a mysterious figure, wearing a long black cape, black fedora, white face mask, and known only as the Phantom, makes an appearance.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo is Missing
programme.desc: When Donatello, Michelangelo, and Raphael return from the video arcade they discover that Donatello's lab is in disarray and Leonardo is missing.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Snakes Alive!
programme.desc: While practicing their martial arts, Leonardo tells Splinter that he is convinced that there is one combat maneuver he has yet to teach the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Polly Wanna Pizza
programme.desc: Michelangelo returns from his sojourn to the pet shop with a monkey named Clyde. After only a few minutes with the undisciplined pet Leonardo, Donatello and Raphael demand that it be returned to the pet shop.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Burne assigns April a story reporting on the increase in urban crime. The only problem is that urban crime is decreasing.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sleuth on the Loose
programme.desc: While the Turtles are watching their favorite TV show April interrupts the broadcast with a special bulletin about a break-in at Dynamic Science Labs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rust Never Sleeps
programme.desc: Krang works on an oxidizer rocket with enough power to blast the Technodrome to Earth, but something goes wrong, and instead of thrust, the device grows rust.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Real Snow Job
programme.desc: The Turtles are holidaying in the Alps, as Splinter goes off to a nearby mountain to meditate. April is in an Alpine village with Irma when she notices the ice and snow melting, unusual for this time of year.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Venice on the Half-Shell
programme.desc: Krang decides to use a hydrofluxer device to flood Venice, holding it for ransom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Artless
programme.desc: Two snobbish art-collecting aliens arrive in Florence and begin stealing great works of art.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder to set up a special lens that will focus the sun's rays to create a devastating heat ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Irish Jig Is Up
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder decide to use Ireland as their base for the Technodrome. With a device called the Rainbow Trans-Charmer, the villains intend to turn harmless little creatures like sheep and rabbits into slavering beasts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's New Sword
programme.desc: In Dimension X Krang is using a long-range scanner and discovers a rare metal buried in a ruined castle in England. The metal turns out to be King Arthur's legendary sword, Excalibur.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Lost Queen of Atlantis
programme.desc: Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop are searching for a valuable energy source in Athens and discover that it is April's new necklace.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on the Orient Express
programme.desc: April is covering the revival of the Orient Express. Shredder is on the train with Rocksteady and Bebop carrying the supercharger, a device to accelerate the train to super speed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Gets in Dutch
programme.desc: April is covering the showing of the world-famed Duchess Diamond. Krang wants the diamond, a flawless stone, to focus the rays on his laser dimension blade.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Northern Lights Out
programme.desc: Eric Red seizes both April and Professor Swenson's map to the underground volcanoes in Scandinavia to tap into the molten energy and melt the polar ice caps.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Elementary, My Dear Turtle
programme.desc: The Turtles are in England, when they are taken back to the past, via an experimental atomic clock and must team up with Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson in order to get the clock back and return to the present.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Night of the Dark Turtle
programme.desc: When Donatello receives a jolt of electrical energy, he undergoes a radical personality transformation, turning into 'The Dark Turtle', a psychotic caped crimefighter on a mission of revenge against Shredder!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Starchild
programme.desc: The Turtles face a crisis of galactic proportions when they must play babysitter to an alien infant with incredible powers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Legend of Koji
programme.desc: The Turtles take an incredible trip back in time when they follow Shredder back to 16th Century Japan, where they join forces with Splinter's ancestor, the youthful samurai koji, and help him found the Foot Clan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Convicts from Dimension X
programme.desc: Donatello, tinkering with his InterDimensional Early Warning System device, accidently frees two vicious convicts from their maximum security cell on Dimension X, bringing them to earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): White Belt, Black Heart
programme.desc: Splinter's ancient sensei, Master Mogo-San, arrives from Japan, seeking to find his grandson, to hand him a precious family heirloom - a sacred white ninja belt.

programme.title: Riptide: Chapel Of Glass
programme.desc: As the lieutenant's wedding nears, a case the guys are working on strikes close to home, and may call into question everything she knows.

programme.title: Riptide: If You Can't Beat 'Em, Join 'Em
programme.desc: The Riptide Detective Agency is hired to consult for a new detective television show. The lead actors follow the guys around for over a week while investigating an actual case.

programme.title: Riptide: Echoes
programme.desc: While in a firefight, one of the guys is shot, and the others deal with the repercussions of what had to be done.

programme.title: Riptide: Pilot
programme.desc: Nick Ryder and Cody Allen leave their former employment, taking tourists on trips by helicopter or by boat, and start their own private detective agency.

programme.title: Riptide: Conflict Of Interest
programme.desc: A girl whom Cody dated. runs away from her husband and goes to the boat looking for him. But they're not there but Murray is and he offers to help her.

programme.title: Riptide: Somebody's Killing The Great Geeks Of America
programme.desc: An attempt is made on Natalie Kramer's life and her associates in the so-called brain trust group have already been assasinated.
programme.sub-title: Somebody's Killing The Great Geeks Of America

programme.title: Riptide: Hatchet Job
programme.desc: Although happy at first that a client found their way to their detective agency, the boys quickly discover she's an escapee from a mental institution.

programme.title: Riptide: The Mean Green Love Machine
programme.desc: A girl from Mama Jo's crew is afraid something has happened to her father and the Riptide Agency goes to Mexico to find out in what kind of trouble he's in.

programme.title: Riptide: Diamonds Are For Never
programme.desc: While in the theater watching Bambi, Murray encounters an upset woman. It turns out she just witnessed the killing of a good friend of hers who turns out to be a diamond smuggler.

programme.title: Riptide: The Hardcase
programme.desc: A young woman spurned is a suspect in a murder.

programme.title: Riptide: Four-Eyes
programme.desc: The boys are hired by a guy to keep tabs on his wife. It seems he wants to divorce her and he wants ammo to avoid giving her alimony.

programme.title: Riptide: #1 With A Bullet
programme.desc: When a music star is killed in a car accident and the equally famous passenger gets injured, the Riptide agency gets hired by his fanclub to deliver flowers to his hospital bed.

programme.title: Riptide: Long Distance Daddy
programme.desc: Nick's sponsor child comes from Cambodia to the USA so his sister can undergo heart surgery.

programme.title: Riptide: Double Your Pleasure
programme.desc: Cody's flirt with a pretty girl sends the boys on a search for her apparently missing sister. Her ties to a mobster make them a target for him and his goons.

programme.title: Riptide: Raiders Of The Lost Sub
programme.desc: Well educated, but just as goofy, Murray's sister shows up unexpectedly, and persuades the boys to look for a sunken WW2 German submarine.

programme.title: Riptide: Something Fishy
programme.desc: Boz and Nick both fall for the same beautiful dolphin-trainer, whose charges become implicated as accomplices in a drug-smuggling scheme.

programme.title: Riptide: Where The Girls Are
programme.desc: The Riptide trio is tasked with protecting three high maintenance women from kidnappers during their California vacation.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Sneak Attack
programme.desc: Appa and Umma learn that selling illegal face cream has a downside. Janet adopts an alternate identity to get into a film festival.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Silent Auction
programme.desc: In hopes of claiming a winning lotto ticket, Janet searches for a legal loophole. Jung has a tough talk with Shannon. Umma covets a fancy coat.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: New TV
programme.desc: Kimchee tries to keep his new girlfriend from meeting Jung. Janet speaks her mind in class. Appa scores a new TV.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's Boyfriend
programme.desc: Janet struggles to keep her parents from learning about her relationship with Raj. Meanwhile, Jung and Kimchee plan a party.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Good Neighbours
programme.desc: Kim's Convenience gets a noisy new neighbor. Jung becomes smitten with a new co-worker. Gerald's new girlfriend rubs Janet the wrong way.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appa's First Text
programme.desc: Appa inherits his daughter's old smartphone. Umma finds a stray dog in the store. Janet and Kimchee bond over dim sum.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Handy Graduation
programme.desc: At a party to celebrate getting his GED, Jung can't ignore his feelings for Shannon. Meanwhile, Janet grows tired of standing in her brother's shadow.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: New Appa-liance
programme.desc: Appa's got a plan to get a new appliance for less, Jung looks to mend old fences and Janet searches for a way to differentiate herself online.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Cutie Pie
programme.desc: Appa worries Umma will be jealous of a flirty online review. Jung returns to his old stomping grounds. Gerald's girlfriend ruffles Janet's feathers.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Open Kimunication
programme.desc: Appa and Umma take their bickering to a new level. Janet crosses paths with a photography idol. Shannon's boyfriend asks Jung for a favor.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Thy Neighbour's Wifi
programme.desc: Appa has a solution for spotty Wi-Fi: use the neighbor's. Jung has eyes for Shannon's friend. Umma and Pastor Nina ask Janet to do a church reading.

programme.title: Mr. D: Coach of the Year
programme.desc: Gerry figures he’s a sure thing for the school’s Coach of the Year award after his team wins the city championship.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry’s Redemption
programme.desc: After losing his Xavier Academy job last season over the unfortunate Coach Keenan saga, Gerry finds himself subbing at a tough inner-city school.

programme.title: Mr. D: Educational Assistant
programme.desc: Gerry is assigned an educational assistant, Marty, who quickly becomes a new source of irritation in the classroom.

programme.title: Mr. D: Wrestling For Love
programme.desc: When Lisa asks Gerry to cover coaching duties for the upcoming wrestling tournament, Gerry promises to bring home two trophies.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Runs A Sweatshop
programme.desc: Gerry hatches a new "get rich quick" scheme selling counterfeit One Direction merchandise when he learns the band is in town.

programme.title: Mr. D: Re-Tired of Marking
programme.desc: When Gerry is suddenly promoted from sub to full-time teacher, his initial thrill is quickly squashed by the realization that he's back to real teaching responsibilities.

programme.title: Mr. D: Duncan vs. Bailey
programme.desc: When Gerry learns that former Olympic champion Donovan Bailey is coming to town, he's determined to seek retribution for a long-standing bone he has with the track "star".

programme.title: Mr. D: Student Teacher
programme.desc: When Gerry and Simon get student teachers, Gerry's hands-off approach fails; Bobbi starts taking supplements; Emma's characters bear a resemblance to some of the staff.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Wants A Union
programme.desc: Gerry decides to form a teachers union at Xavier; Malik bails on his janitorial duties; Lisa has a crush on Trudy's brother.

programme.title: Mr. D: Duncan Does Detention
programme.desc: Gerry is forced into covering Saturday detention; Robert and Lisa have a heart to heart.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Coaches Fencing
programme.desc: Gerry is assigned to help Ricki prepare for a fencing tournament; Bobbi invites Dwyer over for dinner in an attempt to seduce him.

programme.title: Mr. D: Hell-icopter Mom
programme.desc: Gerry is confronted by his overprotective and obnoxious mother; Bobbi tries to pawn off the role of staff punching bag; Ricki sells pencils to Robert.

programme.title: Mr. D: Out Cold
programme.desc: Gerry meets a beautiful woman while on a leadership retreat; Lisa learns of Trudy's gambling ring; Simon and Frank's game takes an ugly turn.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Turns 40
programme.desc: Upon his 40th birthday, Gerry finds a letter he wrote to himself 10 years ago; Simon's ferret goes missing; Lisa tries to impress the chairman of the board of trustees.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Does It Again
programme.desc: Picking up from last season, Gerry and Lisa attempt to navigate their new reality as a married couple.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Wants To Stay Married
programme.desc: While Lisa comes to her senses and decides to back out of the marriage, Gerry isn’t throwing in the conjugal towel quite as quickly.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Gets A Kid
programme.desc: When word spreads that a student’s wealthy father is on his deathbed and preparing to leave gifts for the student’s favorite staff, Gerry makes sure to ingratiate himself to the young boy.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Goes To Prison
programme.desc: In an effort to make some fast money before March break, Gerry takes a side job teaching in a prison.

programme.title: Mr. D: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Gerry steps into the role of a lifetime and finds himself bitten by the acting bug and reveling in the newfound attention.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Throws The Game
programme.desc: Gerry takes on the senior girls’ volleyball team. But when he realizes their semifinals will be interfering with his all-important social schedule, he sets out to sabotage them at the quarterfinals.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Man With Two Red Shoes
programme.desc: When Gerry learns of a lurker near the school, he sets out to catch said lurker and earn the Teacher of the Month title.
programme.sub-title: The Man With Two Red Shoes

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Has Hot Sub Anxiety
programme.desc: Gerry is blown away by the hotness of the new substitute teachers and sets his sights on ‘hot-sub Mary,’ the new love of his life.

programme.title: Takeshi's Castle Thailand: Episode 3
programme.desc: Foot Loose, Slip Way, Human Velcro, Turtle Path, Bridge the Gap, Honeycomb, Final Fall, Final Attack the castle.

programme.title: Takeshi's Castle Thailand: Episode 4
programme.desc: Stepping Stones, Flying Mushroom, Knock Knock, Slip Way, Sumo, Runaway Rockaway, Final Fall, Final Attack the castle.

programme.title: Takeshi's Castle Thailand: Episode 5
programme.desc: Runaway Rockaway, Human Velcro, Slippery Wall, Turtle Path, Sumo, Slip Way, Final Fall, Final Attack the castle.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shopping List; Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Featuring Shopping List; Vaya Con Cornholio.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Dumbasses Anonymous; Nose Bleed; Sick
programme.desc: Featuring Dumbasses Anonymous; Nose Bleed; Sick

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Pierced
programme.desc: Featuring Pierced; Woodshop; Garage Band

programme.title: CSI: New York: One Wedding and a Funeral
programme.desc: Mac, Danny and Hawkes investigates a groom murdered on his wedding day, found stuffed and wrapped like a wedding present. Stella and Lindsay investigate when a jigsaw covered in blood is left on Stella's car.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Child's Play
programme.desc: Flack and Stella investigate a man killed by an exploding cigar. Danny and his neighbor Ruben stumble on a bodega robbery and the boy is killed by a stray bullet. Danny is filled with guilt because he was supposed to be responsible for the child.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Judgment Day
programme.desc: There’s a nervous tension in the air on Judgment Day for all therookies at 15 Division who will have to undergo make-or-break assessments by Staff Sergeant Frank.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Takedown
programme.desc: Andy and Chris accidentally screw up one of the biggest drug busts of the decade when they arrest one of the players. In an effort to save the operation, Swarek and Andy go undercover to make the drug buy.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Butterflies
programme.desc: Andy's world explodes when a fresh-faced university student is killed in a random shooting, and a bullet hits Andy, lodging in her vest.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Might Have Been
programme.desc: Everyone's living their “might-have-beens.” Andy and Gail go undercover as cocktail waitresses to clean up a drug-infested club, but get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Bad Moon
programme.desc: As a full moon hangs over the city, the rookies are unnerved by a series of strange occurrences. While investigating the theft of three severed heads, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a mentally unstable man who has stopped taking his medication

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart & Sparks
programme.desc: As 15 Division recovers from the shooting of Det. Luke Callaghan, a series of arsons culminates in the torching of a laundromat – and the rookies are forced to confront their own burning issues.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Stung
programme.desc: Using a local car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants. One of the criminals they capture tries to bargain for a lighter sentence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: In Plain View
programme.desc: When a police informant is found murdered, 15 Division sets its sights on finding a weak link in the notoriously brutal East Jameson gang. Andy has to work closely with Detective Jo Rosati, a woman who seems far too interested in Andy’s fiancé, Luke.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: When a woman gets brutally attacked in the same manner as deceased rookie cop Zoe Martinelli. Det. Luke Callaghan is convinced that it’s the same suspect.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Monster
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine. Andy and Swarek work together to find the accomplice of a dyed blue bank robber

programme.title: CSI: New York: Buzzkill
programme.desc: When a supermodel is found dead in a giant martini glass on a Times Square billboard, Stella and Lindsay follow the evidence in search of the party crasher.

programme.title: CSI: New York: One Wedding and a Funeral
programme.desc: Mac, Danny and Hawkes investigates a groom murdered on his wedding day, found stuffed and wrapped like a wedding present. Stella and Lindsay investigate when a jigsaw covered in blood is left on Stella's car.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Child's Play
programme.desc: Flack and Stella investigate a man killed by an exploding cigar. Danny and his neighbor Ruben stumble on a bodega robbery and the boy is killed by a stray bullet. Danny is filled with guilt because he was supposed to be responsible for the child.

programme.title: Law & Order: Turnaround
programme.desc: The investigation into Ellison's murder progresses.

programme.title: Law & Order: Showtime
programme.desc: A lawyer tries to create reasonable doubt that his client has commited the crime.

programme.title: Law & Order: Mad Dog
programme.desc: McCoy is determined to bring a convicted serial rapist to justice.

programme.title: Law & Order: Double Down
programme.desc: The only hope of finding a car driver alive is through one of the men who kidnapped him.

programme.title: Law & Order: We Like Mike
programme.desc: A murderer's conviction rests on the testimony of a man wrongfully arrested for the crime.

programme.title: DAZN Ringside
programme.desc: DAZN Ringside brings you the very best of boxing – the biggest fights of the year including selected live undercards, plus original feature-length documentaries, special short films and DAZN Boxing Show, featuring the biggest names in boxing.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: My Strange Addiction Special 2
programme.desc: In this one-hour special, we revisit six of our addicts whose stories shocked the world. Tune in for exclusive never before seen footage in this special episode.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Couch Cushion/Furry
programme.desc: While battling her addiction to eating couch cushions, Adele has destroyed 7 couches and 2 chairs. Meanwhile, Lauren is more comfortable in her fur suit than in her own skin.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Can’t Stop Cleaning/Love Rocks
programme.desc: Cyntrelle dropped out of high school because of her addiction to cleaning. Belinda's obsession with rocks has taken over her life, with more than 100,000 scattered around her home.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Married to a Doll/Picking My Scabs
programme.desc: Davecat has been married to his synthetic wife for 10 years. Meanwhile, Rachael hopes that her compulsive scab picking will stop by her wedding day.
programme.sub-title: Married to a Doll/Picking My Scabs

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Toilet Paper/Blow Dryer
programme.desc: Lori has been sleeping with her blow dryer for 20 years, despite the risk burns or fire. Meanwhile, Kesha's family is concerned that eating half a roll of toilet paper a day is causing health issues.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Mannequin Invasion_Carrot Queen
programme.desc: Chad Michael is a mannequin fanatic. His collection of over 300 mannequins has taken over every room of his house. Zizi has 35 carrot tattoos and she’s decorated every room with a carrot theme.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: My Crazy Obsession Pilot
programme.desc: My Collection Obsession takes you deep inside the world of four of the country’s most obsessed collectors each taking their material obsession to jaw-dropping extremes.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Ventriloquist/Cat Lady
programme.desc: April's addiction to her puppets has gotten so strong she can't go anywhere without them. Debbie is severely allergic to cats, but has over twenty of them, leaving her in isolation.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Hair Puller/Shoe Fanatic
programme.desc: Showcases a woman addicted to shoes, while another is addicted to pulling her hair and eating the follicle.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Greg Dreams of Jeannie_The Amazing Squirrel
programme.desc: Greg’s obsession with 60’s pop-culture has literally taken over his home. Kelly’s life revolves around her pet squirrel, Sugar Bush and his photo appearances.
programme.sub-title: Greg Dreams of Jeannie_The Amazing Squirrel

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Dating My Car/ Baby Powder Addict
programme.desc: Nathaniel has been in a relationship with his car for nearly five years, taking it out on dates, buying it gifts, and even getting intimate with it. Jaye has been addicted to snorting baby powder.
programme.sub-title: Dating My Car/ Baby Powder Addict

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Laxatives and Pottery/Ashes
programme.desc: Kimberly takes hundreds of laxatives a day in an attempt to lose weight. Meanwhile, Bianca prefers to eat pottery and cigarette ashes instead of food.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Dr Christian Jessen faces a bumpy ride this week in the feeding clinic as superskinny size zero Louise Sapsford, who clocks in at 6 stone 2lb, faces up to supersize 28 stone 13 pounder Desroy Gordon's challenging diet of non-stop take-aways.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Tonight it’s a Supersize Vs Superskinny first-a double swap! Cake-aholicsmother and daughter Janet and Tara Wells swap diets with too busy to eat Joanne Evans and KeithLinage.
programme.sub-title: Janet and Tara vs Joanne and Keith

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: In the feeding clinic Louise Knox, queen of convenience food, meets Carly Pitman, who's so busy she never finds the time to eat.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: It’s one of the tensest swaps yetas 32 year old monster portion king James Collier goes head to head with uninterested undereater 31 year old ModasserZafar.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Since leaving home 26 year old Kevin Calladine hasn't had a decent meal. Short on time and money his weight has plummeted to just 8 stone 7lbs and he's two stones underweight.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Junk food addict Andy moves into the feeding clinic with `too-busy-to-eat' Hannah, who battles with Andy's junk food medley as she forces down pizzas, burgers and kebabs.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: 41 year old Trudy from Bedfordshire runs her own business and is a mum of three. Kim is a fitness fanatic who runs 45 miles a week but eats like a sparrow.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: This week it’s atale of twoAmy’s in the feeding clinic as Supersize Amy Green who tips the scales at a staggering 20 stone 8lbs swaps diets with Superskinny Amy Walsh who only weighs 7 stone 10.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Jade weighs just five and half stone, and is desperate to regain her pre-pregnancy size for the sake of her young son. Julie, binges on huge platefuls of home cooked food.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: This week it’s non stop tears and tantrums as 21 stone 5lbs LouiseHayes is forced to swap her normal 5-6 course feasts for superskinny Josh Evans‘s diet which barely features a proper meal.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Dr Christian Jessen faces a bumpy ride this week in the feeding clinic as superskinny size zero Louise Sapsford, who clocks in at 6 stone 2lb, faces up to supersize 28 stone 13 pounder Desroy Gordon's challenging diet of non-stop take-aways.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Twists & Turns
programme.desc: A violent convict may be faking paralysis as part of a prison escape plan; a young man seems to be suffocating for no apparent reason; a father is stabbed in the heart trying to protect his son; a college cheerleader mysteriously goes into cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: With the help of a Bangkok real estate expert, Max Gloeckner, Mike is confident he can deliver just what Mae is looking for. This episode features the last two of four properties.
programme.sub-title: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 2)

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Infinite View (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vicky is searching for a home in The Beaches for her and her family. No one knows the Beach like Inez Kudryk, so Vicky enlists her help in finding some stunning luxury properties to tour.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Infinite View (Part 2)
programme.desc: Will Vicky find the forever home of her dreams? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase and special appearances by guest agent Jasmine Xuereb.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sunset on the Patio (Part 1)
programme.desc: Steve Bailey to save the day! This week's episode features the lovely couple Chris and Rosa as they search for the perfect home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sunset on the Patio (Part 2)
programme.desc: Unfortunately for Rosa, she isn't seeing the benefits of moving to a town around Cambridge. Steve's got some neat ideas, but will they be able to convince Rosa? This episode features the last two of four properties.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Home Belize (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads to the island of Ambergris Caye, Belize to help a friend and former client, actress and choreographer Zuzana Marosová. As a public figure, Zuzana craves privacy in her personal time and is looking for a relaxing space.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Home Belize (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the help of local realtor Daniel Hartin, Sofie sets her sights on the perfect home...and hopefully a bit of fun in the sun! This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the client decides to purchase.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Nice Family Home (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jessica and Mark are a young couple living and working in Thailand after meeting there several years ago and falling in love. They are looking for a permanent home in Bangkok, and after chatting with her friend Mae.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Nice Family Home (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the help of local agents Max Gloeckner and Nala Gill, will Mike be able to find a place that suits the whole family? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Clever Income (Part 1)
programme.desc: After helping them find a home last season, Inez is enlisted by Martin and Cheryl to help them find the perfect investment property. While Cheryl wants a property with minimal work and no landlord responsibilities.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Clever Income (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with special guest appearances by interior design expert Shelley Alexanian and guest agent Mo Loulou.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Open Concept (Part 1)
programme.desc: This week's episode features Cambridge realtor extraordinaire Steve Bailey as he helps couple Dan and Melinda search for the perfect home. It's a real battle of contemporary vs. traditional as Dan and Melinda.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Open Concept (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with a special guest appearance by interior design expert Shelley Alexanian.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Big Investment (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vancouver-based couple Jim and Shannon are looking to relocate to their hometown of Toronto with their two daughters. With a budget of 10 million dollars, they enlist the help of savvy realtor Sofie Kehdi.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Big Investment (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with a special appearance by guest agent Tyrone N. Steer.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Magical Home (Part 1)
programme.desc: Off on another adventure! This episode takes Mike Donia on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia as he searches for a home for his clients, Antonio and Kim. Featuring properties in Thailand.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Magical Home (Part 2)
programme.desc: Off on another adventure! This episode takes Mike Donia on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia as he searches for a home for his clients, Antonio and Kim. Featuring properties in Thailand.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Income for a Rainy Day (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vezi and Deborah love the house they purchased last season in Stouffville, but they are ready to make the move to the big city. They enlist the help of Inez Kudryk to show them the best properties she can find in Toronto.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Income for a Rainy Day (Part 2)
programme.desc: Vezi and Deborah love the house they purchased last season in Stouffville, but they are ready to make the move to the big city. They enlist the help of Inez Kudryk to show them the best properties she can find in Toronto.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Tricky Choice (Part 1)
programme.desc: Laura and Steven are a young couple with an expanding family, and are ready to take the next steps in home ownership. They want a large plot of land for their young children to run around and enjoy nature.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Tricky Choice (Part 2)
programme.desc: Laura and Steven are a young couple with an expanding family, and are ready to take the next steps in home ownership. They want a large plot of land for their young children to run around and enjoy nature.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: We Bought a Resort (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: We Bought a Resort (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Net Zero
programme.desc: Julie and James are looking for a new home to raise their two boys. James is in the tech industry and would love an energy efficient home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Wow Factor
programme.desc: Giulia and Scott have recently come into an inheritance and want the house of their dreams. Currently, they live in a modest bungalow in a busy neighbourhood but would prefer to live in a secluded house.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: My Daughter's Plan
programme.desc: Kevin is a retired, successful businessman. He is a single dad to Shannon and Jennifer. Shannon has been accepted into the Ontario Veterinarian College at the University of Guelph.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Feels Like Home
programme.desc: Laura is on the hunt for a new home for long time clients Marino and Paula. The couple and their three kids would like a spacious house with a country feel to escape their hectic lifestyles.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Century Homes
programme.desc: Louise, Jason, and their two children have been living in Europe for the past 10 years, but now they would like to be closer to their family in Canada. Louise absolutely adores the European aesthetic.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Waterfront
programme.desc: Diogo is a dedicated musician working on his new album. He has been debating between moving to Miami or staying in Canada. Toronto is closer to his family and where he feels at home with his music.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Retirement
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Michael are retired and want to move closer to their kids and grandchildren. They want to downsize from their two-story house into a bungalow. Luckily, Eve knows all about luxury bungalows.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Country Home
programme.desc: Tomarra and Rob had just married and blended their two families. As a new family, they want to transition to a quiet neighbourhood away from the hustle and bustle of Toronto. Steve is up for the challenge.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Smart Decision
programme.desc: Darlene and Bruce are in the market for a new home and have enlisted Laura to help them out. Darlene's one request is that they stay close to their current home, where their daughter goes to school.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Pool House
programme.desc: Kathryn and Neil are true urbanites. They love what downtown Toronto has to offer. When Neil found out his company was relocating to Guelph, they weren't thrilled.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Love the Location
programme.desc: Ashley and Ali are ready to take their relationship and living situation to the next level. The young entrepreneurs are prepared to move into a house, but the one thing they can't agree on is where to live.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Big Move
programme.desc: Stephanie is making a big move from BC to Guelph to be closer to her son John and his family. She doesn't want the move to be a hassle and is looking for an accessible, decent-sized home for her grandchildren and visitors from BC.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: My Favourite Homes
programme.desc: Steve Bailey, Mike Donia and Daryl King review their favourite homes. Steve takes us down memory lane to his 18th century farmhouse, and another home with a stunning infinity pool.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: House For an Athlete
programme.desc: ??George is a retired basket ball player, and Mada is an international model. For a man over 7 feet tall, finding the perfect house might be a challenge. Danielle knows high ceilings come in all shapes and sizes.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Treetops
programme.desc: Suhail and Niki have busy schedules. He's a marketing director and she's a doctor so she's often on call for a hospital downtown.

programme.title: Cheaters starts at 9pm
programme.desc: How well do you know your special someone? The Cheaters Detective Agency is here to find out. All the dirty little secrets are going to come out on the long-running hit reality series airing 24/7 on Pluto TV.

programme.title: COPS: Skipping Rocks
programme.desc: A man who ran from police complains that he was not read his rights. Officers detain kids who threw rocks at windowfronts. A paranoid man claims he is being chased by drug dealers.

programme.title: COPS: Tow Time
programme.desc: Police conduct a high-speed chase on a car with a missing tire. Police respond to a tow truck driver being assaulted. Police are called when a relative attacks a woman's husband.

programme.title: COPS: Borderlands
programme.desc: Officers attempt to detain undocumented border crossers. Border patrol discovers a driver with a load of drugs in his car. Officers check passports and a suspicious-looking laptop.
